summary.overall_regression: Critical regression: health score 90 → 80 (+10 pts). 4 critical incident(s).
summary.causal_chain_text: Isolated anomalous events (no confirmed causal chain): 'DB CPU' (43.4% DB time) | 'db file sequential read' (12.4% DB time) | 'log file sync' (2.5% DB time)
summary.headline: DB Time rose 39098% driven by: 31 new application SQL(s) (top: 60yw3d76rn9vt, 71657s).
headline_evidence: Both periods are CPU-bound (bottleneck type unchanged)
Top worsened wait: 'DB CPU' 75.3%→43.4% DB Time

comparisons.root_cause_hint: Time on CPU — actual execution work, not a wait. High CPU can indicate inefficient SQL or increased workload.
comparisons.pathology_meaning: Time on CPU — actual execution work, not a wait. High CPU can indicate inefficient SQL or increased workload.

comparisons.root_cause_hint: Single-block read — index lookup or rowid fetch. High count = many index scans. High avg latency = storage problem.
comparisons.pathology_meaning: Single-block read — index lookup or rowid fetch. High count = many index scans. High avg latency = storage problem.
pathology_investigate: missing indexes causing unselective index scans

comparisons.root_cause_hint: Foreground session waiting for LGWR to flush redo to disk on COMMIT. >20ms avg = slow storage. High count = too many commits.
comparisons.pathology_meaning: Foreground session waiting for LGWR to flush redo to disk on COMMIT. >20ms avg = slow storage. High count = too many commits.

comparisons.root_cause_hint: Multi-block read — full table or index range scan. db_file_multiblock_read_count blocks per I/O.
comparisons.pathology_meaning: Multi-block read — full table or index range scan. db_file_multiblock_read_count blocks per I/O.

comparisons.root_cause_hint: Parallel query or serial large table scan bypassing buffer cache. Common with parallel_degree_policy=AUTO.
comparisons.pathology_meaning: Parallel query or serial large table scan bypassing buffer cache. Common with parallel_degree_policy=AUTO.
pathology_investigate: large table scans in top SQL

comparisons.root_cause_hint: Reading sort/hash results from TEMP tablespace — PGA insufficient, operation spilled to disk.
comparisons.pathology_meaning: Reading sort/hash results from TEMP tablespace — PGA insufficient, operation spilled to disk.

comparisons.root_cause_hint: Session needs a block that another session is currently reading from disk. High concurrency on cold data.
comparisons.pathology_meaning: Session needs a block that another session is currently reading from disk. High concurrency on cold data.
pathology_investigate: frequency of same blocks being fetched from disk

comparisons.event_name: cursor: pin S wait on X
comparisons.root_cause_hint: Session waiting to read a cursor that another session is modifying (hard parsing). Signature of hard parse storm.
comparisons.pathology_meaning: Session waiting to read a cursor that another session is modifying (hard parsing). Signature of hard parse storm.
pathology_investigate: hard parse rate in load profile

comparisons.root_cause_hint: Hot block contention — multiple sessions reading/writing the same buffer simultaneously.
comparisons.pathology_meaning: Hot block contention — multiple sessions reading/writing the same buffer simultaneously.

recommendations.finding: 2 critical SQL statement(s) present in the GOOD period are completely absent from the BAD period AWR (top: g6xyd2uqfnsjg, cw9q26vnqk1cs). These accounted for 32s of elapsed time in the GOOD period. This is strong evidence the batch job or process did NOT complete its primary processing work — it stalled, failed, or was blocked before reaching these execution stages. The lower DB Time in the BAD period reflects less productive work, NOT lower load.
recommendations.action: 1. Check application/batch job logs for errors or early exits during the BAD period. 2. Verify the job reached its processing stages (scheduler logs, job history). 3. Identify what WAS running in BAD that prevented these SQLs from executing. 4. Compare the execution plans of SQLs that ran in BAD vs GOOD for divergence signs.

This is strong evidence the batch job or process did NOT complete its primary processing work — it stalled, failed, or was blocked before reaching these execution stages. The lower DB Time in the BAD period reflects less productive work, NOT lower load.
incident_indicators.remediation: 1. Check application/batch job logs for errors or early exits during the BAD period. 2. Verify the job reached its processing stages (scheduler logs, job history). 3. Identify what WAS running in BAD that prevented these SQLs from executing. 4. Compare the execution plans of SQLs that ran in BAD vs GOOD for divergence signs.
Check DBA_HIST_SQL_PLAN for plan changes. Use DBMS_SPM to lock good plans.

AND owner = 'WWFMGR' ; keyTable c_keyTables%ROWTYPE; BEGIN :RC := 0; -- Loop through the result set FOR keyTable IN c_keyTables LOOP BEGIN DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE ( 'Table: ' || USER || '.' || keyTable.TABLE_NAME); EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'begin dbms_stats.delete_table_stats(''' || USER || ''', ''' || keyTable.TABLE_NAME || ''', cascade_columns=>TRUE, cascade_indexes=>TRUE, force=>TRUE); end;'; EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'begin dbms_stats.lock_table_stats(''' || USER || ''', ''' || keyTable.TABLE_NAME || '''); end;'; EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'truncate table ' || USER || '.' || keyTable.TABLE_NAME; END; END LOOP; UPDATE WWFMGR.SYSTEM_PROPERTIES SET PROPERTY_VALUE = 'Batch is running now, so all the users are suspended until completed' WHERE APPLICATION_NAME = 'WebWORKS' AND CATEGORY = 'login' AND PROPERTY_NAME = 'login_page_message'; COMMIT; END;

all_metrics.label: DB Time/sec
all_metrics.explanation: Total database work per second. Core workload intensity metric.

all_metrics.label: DB CPU/sec
all_metrics.explanation: CPU consumed by database per second. Increasing means more compute demand.

all_metrics.label: Logical Reads/sec
all_metrics.explanation: Buffer gets per second. High values indicate intensive SQL scanning.

all_metrics.label: Physical Reads/sec
all_metrics.explanation: Disk read blocks per second. High value with low Read IO Requests/s = large multi-block full-table scans (direct-path, invisible to Segments section). High value with proportionally high Read IO Requests/s = many single-block index reads. Compare both metrics together.

all_metrics.label: Physical Writes/sec
all_metrics.explanation: Disk writes per second. Increase may indicate more DML or redo/undo activity.

all_metrics.label: Redo Size/sec
all_metrics.explanation: Bytes of redo generated per second. Higher means more DML workload.

all_metrics.label: Hard Parses/sec
all_metrics.explanation: Hard parses per second. >100/s indicates literal SQL or cursor invalidation.

all_metrics.label: Executes/sec
all_metrics.explanation: SQL executions per second. Application throughput indicator.

all_metrics.label: Transactions/sec
all_metrics.explanation: User commits+rollbacks per second. Primary business throughput KPI.

all_metrics.label: Logons/sec
all_metrics.explanation: New session creations per second. Spike signals connection pool churn.

all_metrics.label: User Calls/sec
all_metrics.explanation: User-originated calls per second. Overall application request rate.

all_metrics.label: Block Changes/sec
all_metrics.explanation: Buffer blocks modified per second. Correlates with redo and DML volume.

all_metrics.label: Buffer Cache Hit %
all_metrics.explanation: Data found in RAM vs disk. <95% = excessive physical I/O.

all_metrics.label: Library Cache Hit %
all_metrics.explanation: SQL look-ups that found the cursor in memory. Low = shared pool too small.

all_metrics.label: Soft Parse %
all_metrics.explanation: SQL executions that reused a cached plan. <95% = hard parse storm.

all_metrics.label: Execute to Parse %
all_metrics.explanation: % executes reusing open cursor. Low = cursor caching not enabled.

all_metrics.label: Latch Hit %
all_metrics.explanation: Internal Oracle lock efficiency. <99% = contention in shared memory.

all_metrics.label: DB Time (min)
all_metrics.explanation: Total database active time. Core load indicator.

all_metrics.label: Avg Active Sessions
all_metrics.explanation: Sessions actively working. >CPU count = saturation.

all_metrics.label: Transactions/sec
all_metrics.explanation: Business throughput KPI (commits+rollbacks per second).

all_metrics.label: Elapsed Window
all_metrics.explanation: Observation window length. Large difference = unequal comparison.

all_metrics.label: DB CPU
all_metrics.explanation: Time on CPU — actual execution work, not a wait. High CPU can indicate inefficient SQL or increased workload.

all_metrics.label: db file sequential read
all_metrics.explanation: Single-block read — index lookup or rowid fetch. High count = many index scans. High avg latency = storage problem.

all_metrics.label: log file sync
all_metrics.explanation: Foreground session waiting for LGWR to flush redo to disk on COMMIT. >20ms avg = slow storage. High count = too many commits.

all_metrics.label: db file scattered read
all_metrics.explanation: Multi-block read — full table or index range scan. db_file_multiblock_read_count blocks per I/O.

all_metrics.label: control file sequential read
all_metrics.explanation: Wait event contributing 0.1% of DB time.

all_metrics.label: direct path read
all_metrics.explanation: Parallel query or serial large table scan bypassing buffer cache. Common with parallel_degree_policy=AUTO.

all_metrics.label: db file parallel read
all_metrics.explanation: Wait event contributing 0.6% of DB time.

all_metrics.label: direct path read temp
all_metrics.explanation: Reading sort/hash results from TEMP tablespace — PGA insufficient, operation spilled to disk.

all_metrics.label: log file sequential read
all_metrics.explanation: Wait event contributing 0.1% of DB time.

recommendations.finding: Log file sync average wait is 16.9ms, exceeding the 10ms threshold.  Commit latency is elevated.
recommendations.action: Move redo logs to faster storage or reduce commit frequency
recommendations.oracle_fix:
-- Move redo logs to SSD/flash
-- Consider COMMIT WRITE BATCH NOWAIT for non-critical transactions
recommendations.impact: Reduces commit latency and session queuing

recommendations.finding: SQL_ID 8nz8dvxhhqhc2 regressed 566% in elapsed time (32.3s -> 215.1s).
recommendations.action: Analyze execution plan, check for plan flip.  Compare plans with DBMS_XPLAN.DISPLAY_AWR.
recommendations.impact: Directly reduces DB time contribution of regressed SQL

recommendations.finding: PGA memory pressure detected: free memory 3.6GB of 62.7GB (5.8%).
recommendations.action: Increase pga_aggregate_target
recommendations.impact: Reduces temp-space I/O and sort/hash-join spills

recommendations.finding: Execute-to-parse ratio is 72.5% (threshold 75%).  Nearly every execution requires a parse call, wasting CPU on repeated soft parses.
recommendations.action: Use session-cached cursors and hold cursors open in the application connection pool
recommendations.oracle_fix:
ALTER SYSTEM SET session_cached_cursors=100 SCOPE=BOTH;
ALTER SYSTEM SET open_cursors=500 SCOPE=BOTH;
recommendations.impact: Reduces parse overhead and CPU consumption

insights.title: Workload Change: DB Time increased 39098%

Bad: DB Time 1579.7 min, Elapsed 150.3 min, AAS 10.5
insights.root_cause: Significant workload increase — more SQL activity, higher concurrency, or data volume growth.

insights.title: 31 New SQL Statements in Bad Period

evidence: 60yw3d76rn9vt: 71657.3s, 1 execs — SELECT /*+ PARALLEL */ DMDUNIT, DMDGROUP, LOC, SUM
9wrpu5pdvbxw3: 1368.0s, 10643 execs — INSERT INTO fcstperfstatic ( jobid, userid, dmduni

evidence: db file parallel read: 536.6s (0.6% DB time)

insights.title: Data Volume Increase Detected (3 SQLs)
insights.summary: 3 SQL statements show increased execution counts without per-execution time changes. This indicates data volume growth, not SQL regression. The queries themselves are fine — there's simply more data to process.
evidence: 0h16msq5g0883: execs 73,349 → 255,472 (+248%), per-exec 0.000s → 0.000s (stable) — SELECT NAME, VALUE FROM SRE_GLOBAL_PROPERTY WHERE
87fzyp4nvktqr: execs 84,709 → 295,061 (+248%), per-exec 0.000s → 0.000s (stable) — UPDATE SRE_NODE SET LAST_HEARTBEAT = SYS_EXTRACT_U
insights.root_cause: Data volume increased between the two periods. More rows to process means more executions of the same queries. Check: batch input data size, table row counts, partition growth.
insights.action: Verify data volume change with: SELECT COUNT(*) and partition stats. If volume growth is expected, consider partitioning, parallel DML, or batch scheduling changes. These are NOT SQL tuning candidates — the per-execution time is stable.

analysis_notes: RULE: ADDM recommendations are guides, not gospel. Validate each recommendation against multiple AWR periods before making system changes. Do NOT increase SGA/PGA based on a single AWR report alone — gather at least 3–5 representative periods.

RULE: Buffer Cache Hit Ratio is not a primary health signal. A 99% hit ratio can coexist with a burning system. Investigate wait events and per-execution SQL metrics instead.

0ctk7jpux5chm.fullText: WITH RECINFO AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ FINDING_ID, COUNT(R.REC_ID) RECCOUNT, R.TYPE FROM DBA_ADVISOR_RECOMMENDATIONS R WHERE TASK_ID=:B1 GROUP BY R.FINDING_ID, R.TYPE ), F_CURR AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ DISTINCT FINDING_NAME FROM DBA_ADVISOR_FINDINGS WHERE TASK_ID=:B1 ), TASKS AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ T.TASK_ID, I.LOCAL_TASK_ID, T.END_TIME, T.BEGIN_TIME FROM DBA_ADDM_TASKS T, DBA_ADDM_INSTANCES I WHERE T.END_TIME>SYSDATE -1 AND T.TASK_ID=I.TASK_ID AND I.INSTANCE_NUMBER=SYS_CONTEXT('USERENV', 'INSTANCE') AND T.REQUESTED_ANALYSIS='INSTANCE' ), F_ALL AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ COUNT(FA.TASK_ID) FINDING_COUNT, FA.FINDING_NAME FROM TASKS, DBA_ADVISOR_FINDINGS FA WHERE FA.TASK_ID=TASKS.TASK_ID AND FA.TYPE<>'INFORMATION' AND FA.TYPE<>'WARNING' AND FA.PARENT=0 GROUP BY FA.FINDING_NAME ), HISTORY AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ FINDING_ NAME, FINDING_COUNT FROM F_ALL JOIN F_CURR USING (FINDING_NAME) ) SELECT :B1 TASK_ID, F.FINDING_ID FINDING_ID, DECODE(RECINFO.TYPE, NULL, 'Uncategorized', RECINFO.TYPE) REC_TYPE, RECINFO.RECCOUNT REC_COUNT, F.PERC_ACTIVE_SESS IMPACT_PCT, F.MESSAGE MESSAGE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(:B3 , 'MM-DD-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') START_TIME, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(:B2 , 'MM-DD-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END_TIME, HISTORY.FINDING_COUNT FINDING_COUNT, F.FINDING_NAME FINDING_NAME, F.ACTIVE_SESSIONS ACTIVE_SESSIONS FROM DBA_ADDM_FINDINGS F, RECINFO, HISTORY WHERE F.TASK_ID=:B1 AND F.TYPE<>'INFORMATION' AND F.TYPE<>'WARNING' AND F.FILTERED<>'Y' AND F.PARENT=0 AND F.FINDING_ID=RECINFO.FINDING_ID (+) AND F.FINDING_NAME=HISTORY.FINDING_NAME ORDER BY F.FINDING_ID

1shhygvj3zw36.fullText: SELECT M.APPLICATION_NAME, M.MEASURE_ID FROM MD_MEASURE_APPLICATION M WHERE M.MEASURE_ID = :1

2ygq9xzf7kusm.fullText: SELECT /*+ OPT_PARAM('_parallel_syspls_obey_force' 'false') */ TYP_OWN.NAME, CASE BITAND(COL_TYP.FLAGS, 16) WHEN 16 THEN 'REF ' END || TYP_OBJ.NAME, COL_INF.TYPE#, COL_INF.PROPERTY, IDX_COL.SPARE1, IDX_COL.SPARE3, COL_INF.OBJ#, COL_INF.INTCOL# FROM OBJ$ TYP_OBJ, USER$ TYP_OWN, COL$ COL_INF, COLTYPE$ COL_TYP, OBJ$ TAB_OBJ, USER$ TAB_OWN, ICOL$ IDX_COL WHERE TAB_OWN.NAME = :B3 AND TAB_OBJ.NAME = :B2 AND TAB_OBJ.TYPE# = 2 AND COL_INF.NAME = :B1 AND TAB_OBJ.OWNER# = TAB_OWN.USER# AND TAB_OBJ.OBJ# = COL_INF.OBJ# AND COL_INF.OBJ# = COL_TYP.OBJ# (+) AND COL_INF.INTCOL# = COL_TYP.INTCOL# (+) AND COL_TYP.TOID = TYP_OBJ.OID$ (+) AND TYP_OBJ.OWNER# = TYP_OWN.USER# (+) AND COL_INF.OBJ# = IDX_COL.BO# (+) AND COL_INF.INTCOL# = IDX_COL.INTCOL# (+)

3dbzmtf9ahvzt.fullText: merge /* KSXM:OPTIM_DML_INF */ into sys.mon_mods_all$ m using dual on (m.obj# = :objn and (:pobjn = 0 or m.obj# = :pobjn or m.obj# in (select obj# from tabpart$ where bo# = :pobjn and obj# = :objn union all select obj# from tabcompart$ where bo# = :pobjn and o bj# = :objn union all select tsp.obj# from tabsubpart$ tsp, tabcompart$ tcp where tsp.pobj# = tcp.obj# and (tcp.bo# = :pobjn or tcp.obj# = :pobjn) and tsp.obj# = :objn))) when matched then update set inserts = decode(:reset, 1, 0, inserts) + :ins, updates = decode(:reset, 1, 0, updates) + :upd, deletes = decode(:reset, 1, 0, deletes) + :del, flags = decode(:reset, 1, 0, flags - bitand(flags, :flag)) + :flag, drop_segments = decode(:reset, 1, 0, d rop_segments) + :dropseg, timestamp = :time when NOT matched then insert (obj#, inserts, updates, deletes, timestamp, flags, drop_segments) values (:objn, :ins, :upd, :del, :time, :flag, :dropseg) where :ins != 0 or :upd != 0 or :del != 0 or :flag != 0 or :dropseg !=0

"_OPTSTAT_HISTHEAD_HISTORY_DEC" H, (SELECT * FROM "_OPTSTAT_HISTGRM_HISTORY_DEC" WHERE :B1 IS NOT NULL) HG WHERE C.OBJ# = TP.BO# AND H.OBJ# = TP.OBJ# AND H.INTCOL# = C.INTCOL# AND HG.OBJ#(+) = H.OBJ# AND HG.INTCOL#(+) = H.INTCOL# AND HG.SAVTIME(+) = H.SAVTIME AND H.SAVTIME > :B2 AND H.SAVTIME = (SELECT /*+ no_unnest */ MIN(CF.SAVTIME) FROM SYS.WRI$_OPTSTAT_HISTHEAD_HISTORY CF WHERE CF.OBJ# = H.OBJ# AND CF.INTCOL# = H.INTCOL# AND CF.SAVTIME > :B2 ) UNION ALL SELECT /*+ ordered use_nl_with_index(tp) use_nl_with_index(c) use_nl_with_index(h) index(h I_WRI$_OPTSTAT_HH_OBJ_ICOL_ST) push_pred(hg) use_nl_with_index(op) */ TS.OBJ#, 34 TYPE#, OP.SUBNAME COMPART, C.NAME, BITAND(H.FLAGS, 2+128+65536+131072) GLOB_ST, BITAND(H.FLAGS, 1 ) USER_ST, H.DISTCNT, H.DENSITY, H.SAMPLE_DISTCNT, NVL(H.SAMPLE_SIZE, 0) SSIZE, H.NULL_ CNT, H.TIMESTAMP#, H.AVGCLN, H.LOWVAL, H.HIVAL, H.MINIMUM, H.MAXIMUM, NULL DMIN, NULL DMAX, BITAND(H.FLAGS, 64) CCNT, HG.BUCKET, HG.ENDPOINT, CASE WHEN HG.EPVALUE IS NOT NULL THEN UTL_RAW.CAST_TO_RAW(HG.EPVALUE) ELSE HG.EPVALUE_RAW END EPVALUE_RAW, BITAND(H.FLAGS, 4 + 1024 + 4096 + 8192 + 16384) HISTFLG, HG.EP_REPEAT_COUNT, H.FLAGS, H.INTCOL# INTCOL# FROM SYS.TABSUBPART$ TS, SYS.TABCOMPART$ TP, SYS.COL$ C, SYS. 5pazx6dft6hru.fullText: select o.owner#, o.name, o.namespace, o.obj#, d.d_timestamp, nvl(d.property, 0), o.type#, o.subname, o.status, d.d_attrs from dependency$ d, obj$ o where d.p_obj#=:1 and (d.p_timestamp=nvl(:2, d.p_timestamp) or d.property=2) and o.owner#=nvl(:3, o.owner#) and d.d_obj#=o.obj# order by o.obj#

5uruj6n2suc5t.fullText: with last_run as ( SELECT all_runs.OWNER, all_runs.JOB_NAME, all_runs.STATUS FROM DBA_SCHEDULER_JOB_RUN_DETAILS all_runs, (SELECT sub.OWNER, sub.JOB_NAME, MAX(sub.ACTUAL_START_DATE) AS START_DATE FROM DBA_SCHEDULER_JOB_RUN_DETAILS sub WHERE sub.job_name in (SELECT job_name FROM DBA_SCHEDULER_JOB_RUN_DETAILS where status = :"SYS_B_00") GROUP BY sub.OWNER, JOB_NAME) latest_runs WHERE all_runs.status = :"SYS_B_01" AND all_runs.OWNER= latest_runs.OWNER AND all_runs.JOB_NAME= latest_runs.JOB_NAME AND all_runs.ACTUAL_START_DATE=latest_runs.START_DATE ) SELECT NVL(SUM(broken), :"SYS_B_02"), NVL(SUM(failed), :"SYS_B_03") FROM (SELECT DECODE(broken, :"SYS_B_04", :"SYS_B_05", :"SYS_B_06") broken, DECODE(NVL(failures, :"SYS_B_07"), :"SYS_B_08", :"SYS_B_09 ", :"SYS_B_10") failed FROM dba_jobs UNION ALL SELECT DECODE(STATE, :"SYS_B_11", :"SYS_B_12", :"SYS_B_13") broken, DECODE(STATUS , :"SYS_B_14", DECODE(STATE, :"SYS_B_15", :"SYS_B_16", :"SYS_B_17", :"SYS_B_18", :"SYS_B_19"), :"SYS_B_20") failed FROM (SELECT all_jobs.OWNER, all_jobs.JOB_NAME, last_run.STATUS, all_jobs.STATE FROM last_run, DBA_SCHEDULER_JOBS all_jobs WHERE last_run.OWNER=all_jobs.OWNER AND last_run.JOB_NAME=all_jobs.JOB_NAME))

5wyjqzgqsduk1.fullText: SELECT SSO_ID, SESSION_ID, CALLBACK_URL, USER_NAME, PRINCIPAL_ID, DIRTY_FLAG FROM SSO_MAP where SSO_ID = :1

6h3cwmunz5z8q.fullText: select col#, grantee#, privilege#, max(mod(nvl(option$, 0), 2)), max(bitand(nvl(option$, 0), 8) /8), max(bitand(nvl(option$, 0), 16) /16), max(bitand(nvl(option$, 0), 64) /64), max(bitand(nvl(option$, 0), 128) /128) from objauth$ where obj#=:1 and col# is not null group by privilege#, col#, grantee# order by col#, grantee#

6mhg68v6vkmz4.fullText: SELECT t.schema_name, t.table_name, atc.table_type, t.system_table, t.is_user_defined, t.is_time_allocatable, t.is_configured, t.is_user_updateable, t.is_monitor_enabled, t.use_schema_pk, t.table_type, t.config_code, t.is_fe_enabled FROM md_table_info t, all_tab_comments atc WHERE t.is_configured = :"SYS_B_0" AND t.schema_name=atc.owner AND t.table_name=atc.table_name UNION SELECT t.schema_name, t.table_name, :"SYS_B_1", t.system_table, t.is_user_defined, t.is_time_allocatable, t.is_configured, t.is_user_updateable, t.is_monitor_enabled, t.use_schema_pk, t.table_type, t.config_code, t.is_fe_enabled FROM md_table_info t WHERE t.is_configured = :"SYS_B_2" AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT owner FROM all_tab_comments WHERE owner = t.schem a_name AND table_name = t.table_name )

6zg7093sv5z4w.fullText: select count(FA#) from SYS_FBA_TRACKEDTABLES where OBJ# = :1 and bitand(FLAGS, :2)=0

7j9hzn9847h1r.fullText: SELECT /*ControlRecordSelectByStateStmtHint*/ COMMITID, COMMITSTATE, SIMULATION_NAME, JOBID, USERNAME, SOURCE, STARTDATE, PCTCOMPLETE, LASTEVENTID, SOURCESIM, APPLDETAILS FROM SCPOMGR.MDAPJOURNALCONTROL WHERE COMMITSTATE=:1 FOR UPDATE

856yfbsdxqs2n.fullText: SELECT MIN(GROUP_NUMBER) FROM SRE_ACTION WHERE ACTION_GROUP_SET_ID = :B4 AND (STATE = :B3 OR (STATE = :B2 AND LOCKERS_NODE_ID IS NULL) OR RETRY_COUNT > :B1 )

87fzyp4nvktqr.fullText: UPDATE SRE_NODE SET LAST_HEARTBEAT = SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) WHERE NODE_ID = :B2 AND ((LAST_HEARTBEAT IS NULL) OR ((SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) - LAST_HEARTBEAT) > :B1 ) OR ((LAST_HEARTBEAT - SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP)) > :B1 ) )

8hw73tznytkyb.fullText: declare poolName SRE_NODE_POOL.POOL_NAME%TYPE := :1 ; lastHeartbeat SRE_NODE_POOL.LAST_HEARTBEAT%TYPE := :2 ; newLastHeartbeat SRE_NODE_POOL.LAST_HEARTBEAT%TYPE := null; poolCt int; begin select count(*) into poolCt from sre_node_pool where pool_name = poolName AND (((SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) - lastHeartbeat) > (NUMTODSINTERVAL(TO_NUMBER(sre_nodecontrol.globalProperty('GROUPMGRTIMEOUTSECS')) / 2, 'SECOND')) ) OR (lastHeartbeat > SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP)) ); if poolCt > 0 then update sre_node_pool set last_heartbeat=SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) where pool_name = poolName and last_heartbeat = lastHeartbeat returning last_heartbeat into newLastHeartbeat; commit; el se select count(*) into poolCt from sre_node_pool where pool_name = poolName and last_heartbeat = lastHeartbeat; if poolCt = 0 then newLastHeartbeat := null; else newLastHeartbeat := lastHeartbeat; end if; end if; :3 := newLastHeartbeat; select decode(a.numnodes, 0, null, a.minnode) into :4 from (select count(*) numnodes, min(node_id) minnode from sre_node where rowid in (SELECT n.rowid FROM sre_node n WHERE n.pool_name = poolName AND n.node_state = 5 UNION SELECT n.rowid FROM sre_node n, sre_job j WHERE n.pool_name = poolName AND n.current_job_id = j.job_id AND j.job_state = 6 AND n.node_state <> 1 ) ) a;end;

8swypbbr0m372.fullText: select order#, columns, types from access$ where d_obj#=:1

9pf44rc90vz0r.fullText: select table_name, owner from ALL_TABLES where owner in (:"SYS_B_0")

9s3zh53bs8c4q.fullText: SELECT owner, table_name, column_name, data_type FROM all_tab_columns WHERE table_name like :"SYS_B_0" escape :"SYS_B_1" AND column_name not in (:"SYS_B_2", :"SYS_B_3", :"SYS_B_4", :"SYS_B_5", :"SYS_B_6")

aq0t5ju2h9tjh.fullText: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SRE_JOB, SRE_NODE_POOL_CONFIG WHERE SRE_JOB.SERVICE_NAME = SRE_NODE_POOL_CONFIG.SERVICE_NAME AND SRE_JOB.NODE_CONFIG_NAME = SRE_NODE_POOL_CONFIG.NODE_CONFIG_NAME AND SRE_NODE_POOL_CONFIG.POOL_NAME = :B4 AND ((JOB_TYPE = :B3 AND IS_CONTINUOUS_ENABLED = 1) OR (JOB_TYPE = :B2 ) ) AND JOB_STATE = :B1 AND SRE_JOB.JOB_ID IN (SELECT JOB_ID FROM (SELECT JOB_ID, ROWNUM JOBROWNUM FROM (SELECT JOB_ID FROM SRE_JOB WHERE ((((JOB_TYPE = :B3 AND IS_CONTINUOUS_ENABLED = 1) OR (JOB_TYPE = :B2 ) ) AND JOB_STATE = :B1 ) OR (JOB_ID = :B5 ) ) AND LOCKERS_NODE_ID IS NULL AND SUBMISSION_DATE <= SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) ORDER BY JOB_TYPE DESC, JOB_PRIORITY DESC, SUBMISSION_DATE, JOB_ID ) ) WHERE JOBROWNUM < (SELECT MIN(CANDIDATEROWNUM) + :B6 FROM (SELECT JOB_ID, ROWNUM CANDIDATEROWNUM FROM (SELECT JOB_ID FROM SRE_JOB WHERE ((((JOB_TYPE = : B3 AND IS_CONTINUOUS_ENABLED = 1) OR (JOB_TYPE = :B2 ) ) AND JOB_STATE = :B1 ) OR (JOB_ID = :B5 ) ) AND LOCKERS_NODE_ID IS NULL AND SUBMISSION_DATE <= SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) ORDER BY JOB_TYPE DESC, JOB_PRIORITY DESC, SUBMISSION_DATE, JOB_ID ) ) WHERE JOB_ID = :B5 ) )

aycvtzhu6r5r3.fullText: DECLARE CURSOR c_keyTables IS SELECT table_name, num_rows FROM all_tables WHERE ( table_name LIKE 'KEY!_%' ESCAPE '!' ) --AND num_rows IS NOT NULL ; keyTable c_keyTables%ROWTYPE; BEGIN :RC := 0; -- Loop through the result set FOR keyTable IN c_keyTables LOOP BEGIN DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE ( 'Table: ' || USER || '.' || keyTable.TABLE_NAME); EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'begin dbms_stats.delete_table_stats(''' || USER || ''', ''' || keyTable.TABLE_NAME || ''', cascade_columns=>TRUE, cascade_indexes=>TRUE, force=>TRUE); end;'; EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'begin dbms_stats.lock_table_stats(''' || USER || ''', ''' || keyTable.TABLE_NAME || '''); end;'; EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'truncate table ' || USER || '.' || keyTable.TABLE_NAME; END; END LOOP; END;

gqtuu21bdd0pw.fullText: DECLARE CURSOR c_keyTables IS SELECT table_name, num_rows FROM all_tables WHERE ( table_name LIKE 'FET!_%' ESCAPE '!' OR table_name LIKE 'TA!_FET!_%' ESCAPE '!') AND owner = 'WWFMGR' ; keyTable c_keyTables%ROWTYPE; BEGIN :RC := 0; -- Loop through the result set FOR keyTable IN c_keyTables LOOP BEGIN DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE ( 'Table: ' || USER || '.' || keyTable.TABLE_NAME); EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'begin dbms_stats.delete_table_stats(''' || USER || ''', ''' || keyTable.TABLE_NAME || ''', cascade_columns=>TRUE, cascade_indexes=>TRUE, force=>TRUE); end;'; EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'begin dbms_stats.lock_table_stats(''' || USER || ''', ''' || keyTable.TABLE_NAME || '''); end;'; EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'truncate table ' || USER || '.' || keyTable.TABLE_NAME; END; END LOOP; UPDATE WWFMGR.SYSTEM_PROPERTIES SET PROPERTY_VALUE = 'Batch is running now, so all the users are suspended until completed' WHERE APPLICATION_NAME = 'WebWORKS' AND CATEGORY = 'login' AND PROPERTY_NAME = 'login_page_message'; COMMIT; END;

_sql_text_map.0ctk7jpux5chm: WITH RECINFO AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ FINDING_ID, COUNT(R.REC_ID) RECCOUNT, R.TYPE FROM DBA_ADVISOR_RECOMMENDATIONS R WHERE TASK_ID=:B1 GROUP BY R.FINDING_ID, R.TYPE ), F_CURR AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ DISTINCT FINDING_NAME FROM DBA_ADVISOR_FINDINGS WHERE TASK_ID=:B1 ), TASKS AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ T.TASK_ID, I.LOCAL_TASK_ID, T.END_TIME, T.BEGIN_TIME FROM DBA_ADDM_TASKS T, DBA_ADDM_INSTANCES I WHERE T.END_TIME>SYSDATE -1 AND T.TASK_ID=I.TASK_ID AND I.INSTANCE_NUMBER=SYS_CONTEXT('USERENV', 'INSTANCE') AND T.REQUESTED_ANALYSIS='INSTANCE' ), F_ALL AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ COUNT(FA.TASK_ID) FINDING_COUNT, FA.FINDING_NAME FROM TASKS, DBA_ADVISOR_FINDINGS FA WHERE FA.TASK_ID=TASKS.TASK_ID AND FA.TYPE<>'INFORMATION' AND FA.TYPE<>'WARNING' AND FA.PARENT=0 GROUP BY FA.FINDING_NAME ), HISTORY AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ FINDING_ NAME, FINDING_COUNT FROM F_ALL JOIN F_CURR USING (FINDING_NAME) ) SELECT :B1 TASK_ID, F.FINDING_ID FINDING_ID, DECODE(RECINFO.TYPE, NULL, 'Uncategorized', RECINFO.TYPE) REC_TYPE, RECINFO.RECCOUNT REC_COUNT, F.PERC_ACTIVE_SESS IMPACT_PCT, F.MESSAGE MESSAGE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(:B3 , 'MM-DD-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') START_TIME, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(:B2 , 'MM-DD-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END_TIME, HISTORY.FINDING_COUNT FINDING_COUNT, F.FINDING_NAME FINDING_NAME, F.ACTIVE_SESSIONS ACTIVE_SESSIONS FROM DBA_ADDM_FINDINGS F, RECINFO, HISTORY WHERE F.TASK_ID=:B1 AND F.TYPE<>'INFORMATION' AND F.TYPE<>'WARNING' AND F.FILTERED<>'Y' AND F.PARENT=0 AND F.FINDING_ID=RECINFO.FINDING_ID (+) AND F.FINDING_NAME=HISTORY.FINDING_NAME ORDER BY F.FINDING_ID
_sql_text_map.0h16msq5g0883: SELECT NAME, VALUE FROM SRE_GLOBAL_PROPERTY WHERE NAME IN (:B8 , :B7 , :B6 , :B5 , :B4 , :B3 , :B2 , :B1 )
_sql_text_map.0pj2mj3gcuz08: SELECT control.USERNAME, journal.MEASURE FROM SCPOMGR.MDAPJOURNALCONTROL control LEFT JOIN SCPOMGR.MDAPJOURNAL journal ON journal.COMMITID = control.COMMITID WHERE control.COMMITSTATE IN (:"SYS_B_0", :"SYS_B_1", :"SYS_B_2") ORDER BY control.USERNAME

_sql_text_map.5pazx6dft6hru: select o.owner#, o.name, o.namespace, o.obj#, d.d_timestamp, nvl(d.property, 0), o.type#, o.subname, o.status, d.d_attrs from dependency$ d, obj$ o where d.p_obj#=:1 and (d.p_timestamp=nvl(:2, d.p_timestamp) or d.property=2) and o.owner#=nvl(:3, o.owner#) and d.d_obj#=o.obj# order by o.obj#
_sql_text_map.5uruj6n2suc5t: with last_run as ( SELECT all_runs.OWNER, all_runs.JOB_NAME, all_runs.STATUS FROM DBA_SCHEDULER_JOB_RUN_DETAILS all_runs, (SELECT sub.OWNER, sub.JOB_NAME, MAX(sub.ACTUAL_START_DATE) AS START_DATE FROM DBA_SCHEDULER_JOB_RUN_DETAILS sub WHERE sub.job_name in (SELECT job_name FROM DBA_SCHEDULER_JOB_RUN_DETAILS where status = :"SYS_B_00") GROUP BY sub.OWNER, JOB_NAME) latest_runs WHERE all_runs.status = :"SYS_B_01" AND all_runs.OWNER= latest_runs.OWNER AND all_runs.JOB_NAME= latest_runs.JOB_NAME AND all_runs.ACTUAL_START_DATE=latest_runs.START_DATE ) SELECT NVL(SUM(broken), :"SYS_B_02"), NVL(SUM(failed), :"SYS_B_03") FROM (SELECT DECODE(broken, :"SYS_B_04", :"SYS_B_05", :"SYS_B_06") broken, DECODE(NVL(failures, :"SYS_B_07"), :"SYS_B_08", :"SYS_B_09 ", :"SYS_B_10") failed FROM dba_jobs UNION ALL SELECT DECODE(STATE, :"SYS_B_11", :"SYS_B_12", :"SYS_B_13") broken, DECODE(STATUS , :"SYS_B_14", DECODE(STATE, :"SYS_B_15", :"SYS_B_16", :"SYS_B_17", :"SYS_B_18", :"SYS_B_19"), :"SYS_B_20") failed FROM (SELECT all_jobs.OWNER, all_jobs.JOB_NAME, last_run.STATUS, all_jobs.STATE FROM last_run, DBA_SCHEDULER_JOBS all_jobs WHERE last_run.OWNER=all_jobs.OWNER AND last_run.JOB_NAME=all_jobs.JOB_NAME))

_sql_text_map.6h3cwmunz5z8q: select col#, grantee#, privilege#, max(mod(nvl(option$, 0), 2)), max(bitand(nvl(option$, 0), 8) /8), max(bitand(nvl(option$, 0), 16) /16), max(bitand(nvl(option$, 0), 64) /64), max(bitand(nvl(option$, 0), 128) /128) from objauth$ where obj#=:1 and col# is not null group by privilege#, col#, grantee# order by col#, grantee#
_sql_text_map.6mhg68v6vkmz4: SELECT t.schema_name, t.table_name, atc.table_type, t.system_table, t.is_user_defined, t.is_time_allocatable, t.is_configured, t.is_user_updateable, t.is_monitor_enabled, t.use_schema_pk, t.table_type, t.config_code, t.is_fe_enabled FROM md_table_info t, all_tab_comments atc WHERE t.is_configured = :"SYS_B_0" AND t.schema_name=atc.owner AND t.table_name=atc.table_name UNION SELECT t.schema_name, t.table_name, :"SYS_B_1", t.system_table, t.is_user_defined, t.is_time_allocatable, t.is_configured, t.is_user_updateable, t.is_monitor_enabled, t.use_schema_pk, t.table_type, t.config_code, t.is_fe_enabled FROM md_table_info t WHERE t.is_configured = :"SYS_B_2" AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT owner FROM all_tab_comments WHERE owner = t.schem a_name AND table_name = t.table_name )
_sql_text_map.6zg7093sv5z4w: select count(FA#) from SYS_FBA_TRACKEDTABLES where OBJ# = :1 and bitand(FLAGS, :2)=0

_sql_text_map.856yfbsdxqs2n: SELECT MIN(GROUP_NUMBER) FROM SRE_ACTION WHERE ACTION_GROUP_SET_ID = :B4 AND (STATE = :B3 OR (STATE = :B2 AND LOCKERS_NODE_ID IS NULL) OR RETRY_COUNT > :B1 )
_sql_text_map.87fzyp4nvktqr: UPDATE SRE_NODE SET LAST_HEARTBEAT = SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) WHERE NODE_ID = :B2 AND ((LAST_HEARTBEAT IS NULL) OR ((SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) - LAST_HEARTBEAT) > :B1 ) OR ((LAST_HEARTBEAT - SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP)) > :B1 ) )
_sql_text_map.8hw73tznytkyb: declare poolName SRE_NODE_POOL.POOL_NAME%TYPE := :1 ; lastHeartbeat SRE_NODE_POOL.LAST_HEARTBEAT%TYPE := :2 ; newLastHeartbeat SRE_NODE_POOL.LAST_HEARTBEAT%TYPE := null; poolCt int; begin select count(*) into poolCt from sre_node_pool where pool_name = poolName AND (((SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) - lastHeartbeat) > (NUMTODSINTERVAL(TO_NUMBER(sre_nodecontrol.globalProperty('GROUPMGRTIMEOUTSECS')) / 2, 'SECOND')) ) OR (lastHeartbeat > SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP)) ); if poolCt > 0 then update sre_node_pool set last_heartbeat=SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) where pool_name = poolName and last_heartbeat = lastHeartbeat returning last_heartbeat into newLastHeartbeat; commit; el se select count(*) into poolCt from sre_node_pool where pool_name = poolName and last_heartbeat = lastHeartbeat; if poolCt = 0 then newLastHeartbeat := null; else newLastHeartbeat := lastHeartbeat; end if; end if; :3 := newLastHeartbeat; select decode(a.numnodes, 0, null, a.minnode) into :4 from (select count(*) numnodes, min(node_id) minnode from sre_node where rowid in (SELECT n.rowid FROM sre_node n WHERE n.pool_name = poolName AND n.node_state = 5 UNION SELECT n.rowid FROM sre_node n, sre_job j WHERE n.pool_name = poolName AND n.current_job_id = j.job_id AND j.job_state = 6 AND n.node_state <> 1 ) ) a;end;

_sql_text_map.9pf44rc90vz0r: select table_name, owner from ALL_TABLES where owner in (:"SYS_B_0")
_sql_text_map.9s3zh53bs8c4q: SELECT owner, table_name, column_name, data_type FROM all_tab_columns WHERE table_name like :"SYS_B_0" escape :"SYS_B_1" AND column_name not in (:"SYS_B_2", :"SYS_B_3", :"SYS_B_4", :"SYS_B_5", :"SYS_B_6")
_sql_text_map.aq0t5ju2h9tjh: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SRE_JOB, SRE_NODE_POOL_CONFIG WHERE SRE_JOB.SERVICE_NAME = SRE_NODE_POOL_CONFIG.SERVICE_NAME AND SRE_JOB.NODE_CONFIG_NAME = SRE_NODE_POOL_CONFIG.NODE_CONFIG_NAME AND SRE_NODE_POOL_CONFIG.POOL_NAME = :B4 AND ((JOB_TYPE = :B3 AND IS_CONTINUOUS_ENABLED = 1) OR (JOB_TYPE = :B2 ) ) AND JOB_STATE = :B1 AND SRE_JOB.JOB_ID IN (SELECT JOB_ID FROM (SELECT JOB_ID, ROWNUM JOBROWNUM FROM (SELECT JOB_ID FROM SRE_JOB WHERE ((((JOB_TYPE = :B3 AND IS_CONTINUOUS_ENABLED = 1) OR (JOB_TYPE = :B2 ) ) AND JOB_STATE = :B1 ) OR (JOB_ID = :B5 ) ) AND LOCKERS_NODE_ID IS NULL AND SUBMISSION_DATE <= SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) ORDER BY JOB_TYPE DESC, JOB_PRIORITY DESC, SUBMISSION_DATE, JOB_ID ) ) WHERE JOBROWNUM < (SELECT MIN(CANDIDATEROWNUM) + :B6 FROM (SELECT JOB_ID, ROWNUM CANDIDATEROWNUM FROM (SELECT JOB_ID FROM SRE_JOB WHERE ((((JOB_TYPE = : B3 AND IS_CONTINUOUS_ENABLED = 1) OR (JOB_TYPE = :B2 ) ) AND JOB_STATE = :B1 ) OR (JOB_ID = :B5 ) ) AND LOCKERS_NODE_ID IS NULL AND SUBMISSION_DATE <= SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) ORDER BY JOB_TYPE DESC, JOB_PRIORITY DESC, SUBMISSION_DATE, JOB_ID ) ) WHERE JOB_ID = :B5 ) )

THEN BUCKET_END_OFFSET / LENGTH_SEG ELSE NULL END LAST_BUCKET_RATIO, CASE WHEN TM_BUCKET_START != BUCKET_END THEN (:B9 - TM_BUCKET_START_OFFSET) / TM_LENGTH_SEG ELSE 1 END TM_FIRST_BUCKET_RATIO, CASE ELSE END_SEG END END_SEG, (LENGTH_SEG - (CASE WHEN START_SEG < 0 THEN -START_SEG ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN END_SEG > TIME_INTERVAL THEN END_SEG - TIME_INTERVAL ELSE 0 END)) LENGTH_SEG, (TM_LENGTH_SEG - SAM PLE_DATE, SAMPLE_TIME, (SAMPLE_TIME - CAST(:B8 AS TIMESTAMP)) REL_SAMPLE_TIME_INT, TRUNC((:B7 - :B8 ) * 3600 * 24) TIME_INTERVAL, :B8 AS BND_START_INTERVAL , :B7 AS BND_END_INTERVAL , DELTA_READ_MEM_BYTES, PGA_ALLOCATED, TEMP_SPACE_ALLOCATED FROM (SELECT ASH0.* FROM V$ACTIVE_SESSION_HISTORY ASH0 WHERE SAMPLE_TIME BETWEEN :B6 AND :B5 AND ( (SESSION_ID = :B2 AND SESSION_SERIAL# = :B1 AND USERENV('INSTANCE') = :B3 ) OR (:B4 = 'yes' AND QC_INSTANCE_ID = :B3 AND QC_SESSION_ID = :B2 AND QC_SESSION_SERIAL# = :B1 ))) ) ASH1 WHERE SAMPLE_DATE >= BND_START_INTERVAL AND SAMPLE_DATE <= BND_END_INTERVAL + 120/3600/24 ) ) WHERE START_SEG <= TIME_INTERVAL ) WHERE (LENGTH_SEG IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH_SEG > 0) OR (TM_LENGTH_SEG IS NOT NULL AND TM_LENGTH_SEG > 0)) ) GROUP BY INST_ID, GROUP_T YPE, BUCKET_START, BUCKET_END, TM_GROUP_TYPE, TM_BUCKET_START, TM_BUCKET_END))) GVTF WHERE INST_ID >= :B11 AND INST_ID <= :B10 GROUP BY GROUP_TYPE, BUCKET_START, BUCKET_END, TM_GROUP_TYPE, TM_BUCKET_START, TM_BUCKET_END ) GROUP BY GROUPING SETS ( (GROUP_TYPE, BUCKET_START, BUCKET_END), (TM_GROUP_TYPE, TM_BUCKET_START, TM_BUCKET_END) )
_sql_text_map.aycvtzhu6r5r3: DECLARE CURSOR c_keyTables IS SELECT table_name, num_rows FROM all_tables WHERE ( table_name LIKE 'KEY!_%' ESCAPE '!' ) --AND num_rows IS NOT NULL ; keyTable c_keyTables%ROWTYPE; BEGIN :RC := 0; -- Loop through the result set FOR keyTable IN c_keyTables LOOP BEGIN DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE ( 'Table: ' || USER || '.' || keyTable.TABLE_NAME); EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'begin dbms_stats.delete_table_stats(''' || USER || ''', ''' || keyTable.TABLE_NAME || ''', cascade_columns=>TRUE, cascade_indexes=>TRUE, force=>TRUE); end;'; EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'begin dbms_stats.lock_table_stats(''' || USER || ''', ''' || keyTable.TABLE_NAME || '''); end;'; EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'truncate table ' || USER || '.' || keyTable.TABLE_NAME; END; END LOOP; END;
_sql_text_map.bq9d0sar3y12k: SELECT c.schema_name, c.table_name, c.column_name, c.logical_data_type_name, utcols.data_type, c.domain_name, c.supports_filters, c.is_user_defined, c.is_user_updateable, c.is_configured, utcols.data_length, utcols.char_length, utcols.data_precision, utcols.data_scale, utcols.nullable, utcols.data_default, c.is_user_required, c.is_user_insertable, c.system_column, c.is_pk, c.is_nullable, c.data_type, c.data_length, c.data_precision, c.data_scale, c.data_default, c.seq_name, c.min_value, c.max_value, c.config_code, c.instance_search_key, c.cluster_type_name, c.is_primary_cluster_type FROM all_tab_cols utcols, md_column_info c, md_table_info t WHERE c.is_configured = :"SYS_B_0" AND t.is_configured = :"SYS_B_1" AND c.schema_name = utcols.owner AND c.schema_name = t.schema_name AND c.table_name = utcols.table_name AND c.table_name = t.table_name AND c.column_name = utcols.column_name

(NUMTODSINTERVAL(SRE_NODE_CONFIG.BLOCKING_FINISH_TIMEOUT, 'SECOND')))) ) OR (NODE_ID IN (SELECT SRE_NODE.NODE_ID FROM SRE_JOB, SRE_NODE, SRE_NODE_CONFIG WHERE SRE_NODE.NODE_ID = SRE_JOB.LOCKERS_NODE_ID AND SRE_NODE.NODE_STAT E = :B7 AND SRE_JOB.JOB_STATE = :B8 AND SRE_JOB.JOB_ID = SRE_NODE.CURRENT_JOB_ID AND SRE_JOB.SERVICE_NAME = SRE_NODE_CONFIG.SERVICE_NAME AND SRE_JOB.NODE_CONFIG_NAME = SRE_NODE_CONFIG.NODE_CONFIG_NAME AND SRE_NODE.NODE_ID <> :B2 AND SRE_NODE.LAST_HEARTBEAT < (SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) - (NUMTODSINTERVAL(SRE_NODE_CONFIG.CLOSE_JOB_TIMEOUT, 'SECOND')))) ) OR (NODE_ID IN (SELECT SRE_NODE.NODE_ID FROM SRE_NODE, SRE_JOB, SRE_NODE_CONFIG WHERE SRE_NODE.CURRENT_JOB_ID = SRE_JOB.JOB_ID AND SRE_JOB.NODE_CONFIG_NAME = SRE_NODE_CONFIG.NODE_CONFIG_NAME AND SRE_JOB.SERVICE_NAME = SRE_NODE_CONFIG.SERVICE_NAME AND (SRE_JOB.LOCKERS_NODE_ID <> SRE_NODE.NODE_ID OR SRE_JOB.LOCKERS_NODE_ID IS NULL) AND SRE_NODE.LAST_HEARTBEAT < (SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) - (NUMTODSINTERVAL(SRE_NODE_CONFIG.BUILD_ACTIONS_TIMEOUT, 'SECOND'))) AND SRE_NODE.NODE_STATE = :B4 AND SRE_NODE.NODE_ID <> :B2 ) ) OR (NODE_ID IN (SELECT SRE_NODE.NODE_ID FROM SRE_NODE, SRE_JOB, SRE_NODE_CONFIG WHERE SR E_NODE.CURRENT_JOB_ID = SRE_JOB.JOB_ID AND SRE_JOB.NODE_CONFIG_NAME = SRE_NODE_CONFIG.NODE_CONFIG_NAME AND SRE_JOB.SERVICE_NAME = SRE_NODE_CONFIG.SERVICE_NAME AND (SRE_JOB.LOCKERS_NODE_ID <> SRE_NODE.NODE_ID OR SRE_JOB.LOCKERS_NODE_ID IS NULL) AND SRE_NODE.LAST_HEARTBEAT < (SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) - (NUMTODSINTERVAL(SRE_NODE_CONFIG.RESET_TIMEOUT, 'SECOND'))) AND SRE_NODE.NODE_STATE = :B9 AND SRE_NODE.NODE_ID <> :B2 ) ) ) RETURNING CURRENT_JOB_ID, NODE_ID INTO :O0 , :O1

_sql_text_map.gqtuu21bdd0pw: DECLARE CURSOR c_keyTables IS SELECT table_name, num_rows FROM all_tables WHERE ( table_name LIKE 'FET!_%' ESCAPE '!' OR table_name LIKE 'TA!_FET!_%' ESCAPE '!') AND owner = 'WWFMGR' ; keyTable c_keyTables%ROWTYPE; BEGIN :RC := 0; -- Loop through the result set FOR keyTable IN c_keyTables LOOP BEGIN DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE ( 'Table: ' || USER || '.' || keyTable.TABLE_NAME); EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'begin dbms_stats.delete_table_stats(''' || USER || ''', ''' || keyTable.TABLE_NAME || ''', cascade_columns=>TRUE, cascade_indexes=>TRUE, force=>TRUE); end;'; EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'begin dbms_stats.lock_table_stats(''' || USER || ''', ''' || keyTable.TABLE_NAME || '''); end;'; EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'truncate table ' || USER || '.' || keyTable.TABLE_NAME; END; END LOOP; UPDATE WWFMGR.SYSTEM_PROPERTIES SET PROPERTY_VALUE = 'Batch is running now, so all the users are suspended until completed' WHERE APPLICATION_NAME = 'WebWORKS' AND CATEGORY = 'login' AND PROPERTY_NAME = 'login_page_message'; COMMIT; END;

sql_stats.sql_text: SELECT /*+ PARALLEL */ DMDUNIT, DMDGROUP, LOC, SUM (QTY), DDATE FROM ( SELECT /*+ PARALLEL */ SO.MATERIAL AS DMDUNIT, SO.SALESTYPE AS DMDGROUP, SM.PLANT AS LOC, SUM (QTY) QTY, TRUNC (DELIVERYDATE, 'IW') DDATE FROM SCPOMGR.UDT_SALESORDERMAPPING SM, SCPOMGR.UDT_SALESORDER SO, SCPOMGR.DMDUNIT DM, SCPOMGR.DFUVIEW DV, SCPOMGR.LOC L WHERE SM.ZIPCODE = SO.ZIPCODE AND SM.MAPTYPE = SO.MAPTYPE AND SM.UDC_VERTICAL =SO.UDC_VERTICAL AND SM.UDC_DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL =SO.UDC_DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL AND SO.HEADERMATERIAL = DM.DMDUNIT AND DV.DMDUNIT = SO.HEADERMATERIAL AND DV.DMDGROUP = SO.SALESTYPE AND DV.LOC = SM.PLANT AND DV.LOC = L.LOC AND DV.UDC_DFUVIEW_RELOAD_SW = 1 AND (L.UDC_HISTORY_RELOAD_SW IS NULL OR L.UDC_HISTORY_RELOAD_SW = 0) AND SO.DELIVERYDATE >= TRUNC (SYSDATE, 'IW') - (365 * 3) AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM SCPOMGR.LOC LC WHERE LC.LOC = SM.PL ANT AND (LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'VMI' OR LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'RP' OR LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'IRC' OR LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'CD')) AND DM.UDC_PRODUCT_CAT = CASE WHEN SM.MAPTYPE = 'FAB' THEN SM.PRODUCT_CAT ELSE DM.UDC_PRODUCT_CAT END GROUP BY SO.MATERIAL, SO.SALESTYPE, SM.PLANT, TRUNC (DELIVERYDATE, 'IW') UNION ALL SELECT /*+ PARALLEL */ SO.MATERIAL AS DMDUNIT, SO.SALESTYPE AS DMDGROUP, SM.PLANT AS LOC, SUM (QTY) QTY, TRUNC (DELIVERYDATE, 'IW') DDATE FROM SCPOMGR.UDT_SALESORDERMAPPING SM, SCPOMGR.UDT_SALESORDER SO, SCPOMGR.DMDUNIT DM, SCPOMGR.DFUVIEW DV, SCPOMGR.LOC L WHERE LENGTH (SO.ZIPCODE) > 5 AND SM.ZIPCODE <> SO.ZIPCODE AND SM.ZIPCODE = SUBSTR (SO.ZIPCODE, 1, 5) AND SM.MAPTYPE = SO.MAPTYPE AND SM.UDC_VERTICAL =SO.UDC_VERTICAL AND SM.UDC_DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL =SO.UDC_DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL AND SO.HEADERMATERIAL = DM.DMDUNIT AND DV.DMDUNIT = SO.HEADERMATERIAL AND DV.DMDGROUP = SO.SALESTYPE AND DV.LOC = SM.PLANT AND DV.LOC = L.LOC AND DV.UDC_DFUVIEW_RELOAD_SW = 1 AND (L.UDC_HISTORY_RELOAD_SW IS NULL OR L.UDC_HISTORY_RELOAD_SW = 0) AND SO.DELIVERYDATE >= TRUNC (SYSDATE, 'IW') - (365 * 3) AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM SCPOMGR.LOC LC WHERE LC.LOC = SM.PLANT AND (LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'VMI' OR LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'RP' OR LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'IRC' OR LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'CD')) AND DM.UDC_PRODUCT_CAT = CASE WHEN SM.MAPTYPE = 'FAB' THEN SM.PRODUCT_CAT ELSE DM.UDC_PRODUCT_CAT END AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SCPOMGR.UDT_SALESORDERMAPPING SM WHERE LENGTH (SM.ZIPCODE) > 5 AND SO.ZIPCODE = SM.ZIPCODE AND SM.MAPTYPE = SO.MAPTYPE AND SM.UDC_VERTICAL =SO.UDC_VERTICAL AND SM.UDC_DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL =SO.UDC_DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL) GROUP BY SO.MATERIAL, SO.SALESTYPE, SM.PLANT, TRUNC (DELIVERYDATE, 'IW') ) GROUP BY DMDUNIT, DMDGROUP, LOC, DDATE

56 * 7 AND SO.DELIVERYDATE < TRUNC (SYSDATE, 'D') - 1 AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM SCPOMGR.LOC LC WHERE LC.LOC = SM.PLANT AND (LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'VMI' OR LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE= 'RP' OR LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'CD' OR LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE= 'IRC')) UNION ALL SELECT /*+ PARALLEL*/ DISTINCT SO.MATERIAL, SO.SALESTYPE, SM.PLANT, '1-1-1' AS UDC_DFULEVEL FROM SCPOMGR.UDT_SALESORDERMAPPING SM, SCPOMGR.UDT_SALESORDER SO, SCPOMGR.DMDUNIT DM WHERE LENGTH (SO.ZIPCODE) > 5 AND SM.ZIPCODE <> SO.ZIPCODE AND SM.ZIPCODE = SUBSTR (SO.ZIPCODE, 1, 5) AND SM.MAPTYPE = SO.MAPTYPE AND SM.UDC_VERTICAL =SO.UDC_VERTICAL AND SM.UDC_DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL =SO.UDC_DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL AND SO.HEADERMATERIAL = DM.DMDUNIT AND SM.PLANT NOT IN ('NJ06', 'MN43') AND DM.UDC_PRODUCT_CAT = CASE WHEN SM.MAPTYPE = 'FAB' THEN SM.PRODUCT_CAT ELSE DM.UDC_PRODUCT_CAT END AND SO.DELIVERYDATE >= TRUNC (SYSDATE, 'D') - 56 * 7 AND SO.DELIVERYDATE < TRUNC (SYSDATE, 'D') - 1 AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM SCPOMGR.LOC LC WHERE LC.LOC = SM.PLANT AND (LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'VMI' OR LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'RP' OR LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'CD' OR LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE= 'IRC')) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SCPOMGR.UDT_SALESORDERMAPPING SM WHERE LENGTH (SM.ZIPCODE) > 5 AND SO.ZIPCODE = SM.ZIPCODE AND SM.MAPTYPE = SO.MAPTYPE AND SM.UDC_VERTICAL =SO.UDC_VERTICAL AND SM.UDC_DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL =SO.UDC_DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL)) QU WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SCPOMGR.DFUVIEW DV WHERE DV.DMDUNIT = QU.MATERIAL AND DV.DMDGROUP = QU.SALESTYPE AND DV.LOC = QU.PLANT) LOG ERRORS INTO IGPMGR.ERR$_INTUPS_DFUVIEW('JOBNAME-jbn006_ups_dfuview* | SCRIPT-jbn006_ups_dfuview.sql | STEP-2:INSERT INTO intups_dfuview') REJECT LIMIT 500

sql_stats.sql_text: DECLARE /*local variables*/ v_processed_count NUMBER (10); c_jobid VARCHAR2 (50) := 'jbi003_upsert_salesorder'; v_proc_status NUMBER (1) := 0; v_error_count NUMBER (10) := 0; BEGIN /*calling igp procedure to move data into live scpo table*/ batchmgr.pkg_process_igp.igp_load (jobid_in => c_jobid, status_out => v_proc_status); pkg_log.info ( 'Records processed from INTUPS_UDT_SALESORDER to UDT_SALESORDER' ); COMMIT; /* DELETE HISTORY OLDER THAN 3 YEARS */ DELETE /*+ PARALLEL(8) */ FROM SCPOMGR.UDT_SALESORDER WHERE DELIVERYDATE <= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'D') - 1095; pkg_log.info ('Salesorder data deleted older than 1095 days-' || SQL%ROWCOUNT); COMMIT; /* DELETE Home Depot Pro History */ DELETE /*+ PARALLEL(8) */ FROM SCPOMGR.UDT_SALESORDER WHERE ship_cust_name ='The Ho me Depot Pro' ; pkg_log.info ('Salesorder data for HD Pro deleted-' || SQL%ROWCOUNT); COMMIT; EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN ROLLBACK; pkg_job.fatal_error; RAISE; END;

sql_stats.sql_text: DECLARE --local variables-- v_processed_count NUMBER (10); c_jobid VARCHAR2 (50); v_proc_status NUMBER (1) := 0; v_error_count NUMBER (10) := 0; v_dmdpostdate DATE; -- variables type declaration -- TYPE t_varchar2_tab IS TABLE OF VARCHAR2 (200); TYPE t_date_tab IS TABLE OF DATE; TYPE t_float_tab IS TABLE OF FLOAT; -- variables used in cursor -- v_dmdunit t_varchar2_tab; v_loc t_varchar2_tab; v_dmdgroup t_varchar2_tab; v_dfulevel t_varchar2_tab; OTHERS THEN ROLLBACK; pkg_job.fatal_error; RAISE; END; END LOOP; v_processed_count := cur_histrealign_dmdunit%ROWCOUNT; pkg_log.info('No of Records processed in HIST for hist realign are -' || v_processed_count); CLOSE cur_histrealign_dmdunit; /*calling igp procedure to move data into live scpo table*/ batchmgr.pkg_process_igp.igp_load (jobid_in => c_jobid, status_out => v_proc_status); COMMIT; pkg_log.info ( 'Records processed from INTINS_HIST to HIST for udc_history_reload_sw' ); ---------------------------------------- /* open cursor and fetch rows using bulk collect */ OPEN cur_histexception; LOOP BEGIN FETCH cur_histexception BULK COLLECT INTO v_dmdunit, v_dmdgroup, v_loc, v_startdate, v_functionnum, v_model, v_qty LIMIT 50000; BEGIN /*insert dfuexception records*/ FORALL j IN INDICES OF v_dmdunit SAVE EXCEPTIONS INSERT /*+ PARALLEL */ INTO scpomgr.dfuexception ( dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, model, functionnum, functionname, descr, when, userid, exception ) VALUES ( v_dmdunit (j), v_dmdgroup (j), v_loc (j), v_model (j ), v_functionnum (j), 'NEGATIVEHISTORY', 'Override removed because base history was less than zero for Start Date ' || TO_CHAR (v_startdate (j), 'mm/dd/yyyy') ||', Qty '|| v_qty (j), SYSDATE, 'BatchUser', 10001 ); COMMIT; EXCEPTION WHEN bulk_errors THEN FOR indx IN 1 .. sql%BULK_EXCEPTIONS.COUNT LOOP /* following line will log the error with record key value */ pkg_log.info(sql%BULK_EXCEPTIONS(indx).ERROR_CODE || v_dmdunit ( sql%BULK_EXCEPTIONS(indx).ERROR_INDEX ) || '-' || v_ dmdgroup ( sql%BULK_EXCEPTIONS(indx).ERROR_INDEX ) || '-' || v_loc ( sql%BULK_EXCEPTIONS(indx).ERROR_INDEX ) || '-' || v_startdate ( sql%BULK_EXCEPTIONS(indx).ERROR_INDEX )); END LOOP; END; BEGIN /*delete histnarrow records*/ FORALL j IN INDICES OF v_dmdunit SAVE EXCEPTIONS DELETE /*+ PARALLEL */ scpomgr.histnarrow WHERE dmdunit = v_dmdunit (j) AND dmdgroup = v_dmdgroup (j) AND loc = v_loc (j) AND startdate = v_startdate (j); COMMIT; EXCEPTION WHEN bulk_errors THEN FOR indx IN 1 .. sql%BULK_EXCEPTIONS.COUNT LOOP /* following line will log the error with record key value */ pkg_log.info(sql%BULK_EXCEPTIONS(indx).ERROR_CODE || v_dmdunit ( sql%BULK_EXCEPTIONS(indx).ERROR_INDEX ) || '-' || v_dmdgroup ( sql%BULK_EXCEPTIONS(indx).ERROR_INDEX ) || '-' || v_loc ( sql%BULK_EXCEPTIONS(indx).ERROR_INDEX ) || '-' || v_startdate ( sql%BULK_EXCEPTIONS(indx).ERROR_INDEX ) ); END LOOP; END; EXIT WHEN cur_histexception%NOTFOUND; EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN ROLLBACK; pkg_job.fatal_error; RAISE; END; END LOOP; v_processed_count := cur_histexception%ROWCOUNT; pkg_log.info ( 'No of Records processed in DFUEXCEPTION ARE -' || v_processed_count ); CLOSE cur_histexception; /* UPDATE scpomgr.dfuview dv SET dv.udc_dfuview_reload_sw = 0 WHERE dv.udc_dfuview_reload_sw = 1; pkg_log.info ( 'Reset udc_dfuview_reload_sw flag to zero - ' || sql%ROWCOUNT );*/ COMMIT; EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN ROLLBACK; pkg_job.fatal_error; RAISE; END;

0ctk7jpux5chm.fullText: WITH RECINFO AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ FINDING_ID, COUNT(R.REC_ID) RECCOUNT, R.TYPE FROM DBA_ADVISOR_RECOMMENDATIONS R WHERE TASK_ID=:B1 GROUP BY R.FINDING_ID, R.TYPE ), F_CURR AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ DISTINCT FINDING_NAME FROM DBA_ADVISOR_FINDINGS WHERE TASK_ID=:B1 ), TASKS AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ T.TASK_ID, I.LOCAL_TASK_ID, T.END_TIME, T.BEGIN_TIME FROM DBA_ADDM_TASKS T, DBA_ADDM_INSTANCES I WHERE T.END_TIME>SYSDATE -1 AND T.TASK_ID=I.TASK_ID AND I.INSTANCE_NUMBER=SYS_CONTEXT('USERENV', 'INSTANCE') AND T.REQUESTED_ANALYSIS='INSTANCE' ), F_ALL AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ COUNT(FA.TASK_ID) FINDING_COUNT, FA.FINDING_NAME FROM TASKS, DBA_ADVISOR_FINDINGS FA WHERE FA.TASK_ID=TASKS.TASK_ID AND FA.TYPE<>'INFORMATION' AND FA.TYPE<>'WARNING' AND FA.PARENT=0 GROUP BY FA.FINDING_NAME ), HISTORY AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ FINDING_ NAME, FINDING_COUNT FROM F_ALL JOIN F_CURR USING (FINDING_NAME) ) SELECT :B1 TASK_ID, F.FINDING_ID FINDING_ID, DECODE(RECINFO.TYPE, NULL, 'Uncategorized', RECINFO.TYPE) REC_TYPE, RECINFO.RECCOUNT REC_COUNT, F.PERC_ACTIVE_SESS IMPACT_PCT, F.MESSAGE MESSAGE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(:B3 , 'MM-DD-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') START_TIME, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(:B2 , 'MM-DD-YYYY HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END_TIME, HISTORY.FINDING_COUNT FINDING_COUNT, F.FINDING_NAME FINDING_NAME, F.ACTIVE_SESSIONS ACTIVE_SESSIONS FROM DBA_ADDM_FINDINGS F, RECINFO, HISTORY WHERE F.TASK_ID=:B1 AND F.TYPE<>'INFORMATION' AND F.TYPE<>'WARNING' AND F.FILTERED<>'Y' AND F.PARENT=0 AND F.FINDING_ID=RECINFO.FINDING_ID (+) AND F.FINDING_NAME=HISTORY.FINDING_NAME ORDER BY F.FINDING_ID

0g27p4cu9b3mp.fullText: DECLARE --local variables-- v_processed_count NUMBER (10); c_jobid VARCHAR2 (50); v_proc_status NUMBER (1) := 0; v_error_count NUMBER (10) := 0; v_dmdpostdate DATE; -- variables type declaration -- TYPE t_varchar2_tab IS TABLE OF VARCHAR2 (200); TYPE t_date_tab IS TABLE OF DATE; TYPE t_float_tab IS TABLE OF FLOAT; -- variables used in cursor -- v_dmdunit t_varchar2_tab; v_loc t_varchar2_tab; v_dmdgroup t_varchar2_tab; v_dfulevel t_varchar2_tab; --bulk exception handling -- bulk_errors exception; PRAGMA EXCEPTION_INIT (bulk_errors, -24381); -- declare cursor that will select source data -- CURSOR cur_dfuview_all IS SELECT DISTINCT dm.dmdunit AS dmdunit, 'ALL' AS dmdgroup, lc.loc AS lo c, '1-1-1' AS dfulevel FROM scpomgr.dmdunit dm, scpomgr.loc lc WHERE lc.udc_loc_level = 'Service Area' AND dm.dmdunit <> ' ' --AND dm.udc_primary_vendor !='2000500754' AND lc.loc NOT IN ('NJ06', 'MN43') -- 05417473 AND lc.udc_int_freight_cons_sw = 0 AND dm.UDC_RECREATE_ALL_DFU=1 AND DM.UDC_DFU_RECREATED_DATE_ALL=to_date('1/1/1970', 'mm/dd/yyyy') AND (lc.udc_branch_type <> 'VMI' AND lc.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE<> 'RP' AND lc.udc_branch_type <> 'IRC' AND lc.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE<> 'CD') --UAT --FIX AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM scpomgr.dfuview dv WHERE dv.dmdunit = dm.dmdunit AND dv.dmdgroup = 'ALL' AND dv.loc = lc.loc) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 --FROM scpomgr.dmdunit du FROM scpomgr.sku su WHERE su.item = dm.dmdunit AND su.loc= lc.loc AND su.udc_xplant_matstatus IN ( SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_SUBSTR ( param_value, '[^, ]+', 1, LEVEL) FROM scpomgr.udt_batchparam WHERE parameter = 'XPLANT_MATSTATUS' CONNECT BY REGEXP_SUBSTR ( param_value, '[^, ]+', 1, LEVEL) IS NOT NULL) AND MONTHS_BETWEEN (SYSDATE, udc_fromdate) > ---check (SELECT param_value FROM scpomgr.udt_batchparam WHERE parameter = 'XPLANT_MATSTATUS_DUR')); /* CURSOR cur_dfuview_mro IS SELECT DISTINCT dm.dmdunit AS dmdunit, 'MRO' AS dmdgroup, lc.loc AS loc, '1-1-1' AS dfulevel FROM scpomgr.dmdunit dm, scpomgr.loc lc WHERE lc.udc_loc_level = 'Service Area' AND dm.dmdunit <> ' ' AND dm.udc_primary_vendor !='2000500754' AND lc.udc_int_freight_cons_sw = 0 AND dm.UDC_RECREATE_MRO_DFU=1 AND DM.UDC_DFU_RE CREATED_DATE_MRO=to_date('1/1/1970', 'mm/dd/yyyy') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM scpomgr.dfuview dv WHERE dv.dmdunit = dm.dmdunit AND dv.dmdgroup = 'MRO' AND dv.loc = lc.loc) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM scpomgr.dmdunit du WHERE du.dmdunit = dm.dmdunit AND du.udc_xplant_matstatus IN ( SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_SUBSTR ( param_value, '[^, ]+', 1, LEVEL) FROM scpomgr.udt_batc hparam WHERE parameter = 'XPLANT_MATSTATUS' CONNECT BY REGEXP_SUBSTR ( param_value, '[^, ]+', 1, LEVEL) IS NOT NULL) AND MONTHS_BETWEEN (SYSDATE, udc_fromdate) > (SELECT param_value FROM scpomgr.udt_batchparam WHERE parameter = 'XPLANT_MATSTATUS_DUR')); -- declare cursor that will select sour ce data -- CURSOR cur_dfuview_pi IS SELECT DISTINCT dm.dmdunit AS dmdunit, 'PI' AS dmdgroup, lc.loc AS loc, '1-1-1' AS dfulevel FROM scpomgr.dmdunit dm, scpomgr.loc lc WHERE lc.udc_loc_level = 'Service Area' AND dm.dmdunit <> ' ' AND lc.udc_int_freight_cons_sw = 0 AND dm.UDC_RECREATE_PI_DFU=1 AND DM.UDC_DFU_RECREATED_DATE_PI=to_date('1/1/1970', 'mm/dd/yyyy') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM scpomgr.dfuview dv WHERE dv.dmdunit = dm.dmdunit AND dv.dmdgroup = 'PI' AND dv.loc = lc.loc) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM scpomgr.dmdunit du WHERE du.dmdunit = dm.dmdunit AND du.udc_xplant_matstatus IN ( SELECT DISTINCT REGEXP_SU BSTR ( param_value, '[^, ]+', 1, LEVEL) FROM scpomgr.udt_batchparam WHERE parameter = 'XPLANT_MATSTATUS' CONNECT BY REGEXP_SUBSTR ( param_value, '[^, ]+', 1, LEVEL) IS NOT NULL) AND MONTHS_BETWEEN (SYSDATE, udc_fromdate) > (SELECT param_value FROM scpomgr.udt_batchparam WHERE parameter = 'XPLANT_MATSTATUS_DUR')); */ BEGIN c_jobid := 'jbn006_ups_dfuview'; /*select last week's Dmdpostdate */ SELECT TO_DATE (param_value, 'MM/DD/YYYY') INTO v_dmdpostdate FROM scpomgr.udt_batchparam WHERE parameter = 'DMDPOSTDT'; -- open cursor and fetch rows using bulk collect -- OPEN cur_dfuview_all; LOOP BEGIN FETCH cur_dfuview_all BULK COLLECT INTO v_dmdunit, v_dmdgroup, v_loc, v_dfulevel LIMIT 80000; BEGIN --upsert dfuview records --default dfu creation FORALL j IN INDICES OF v_dmdunit SAVE EXCEPTION S INSERT INTO igpmgr.intups_dfuview (dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, udc_dfulevel, integration_jobid, integration_stamp) VALUES (v_dmdunit (j), v_dmdgroup (j), v_loc (j), v_dfulevel (j), c_jobid, SYSDATE); COMMIT; EXCEPTION WHEN bulk_errors THEN FOR indx IN 1 .. sql%BULK_EXCEPTIONS.COUNT LOOP --following line will log the error with record key value pkg_log.info(sql%BULK_EXCEPTIONS(indx).ERROR_CODE || v_dmdunit ( sql%BULK_EXCEPTIONS(indx).ERROR_INDEX ) || '-' || v_loc ( sql%BULK_EXCEPTIONS(indx).ERROR_INDEX ) || '-' || v_dmdgroup ( sql%BULK_EXCEPTIONS(indx).ERROR_INDEX )); END LOOP; END; EXIT WHEN cur_dfuview_all%NOTFOUND; EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN ROLLBACK; pkg_job.fatal_error; RAISE; END; END LOOP; v_processed_count := cur_dfuview_all%ROWCOUNT; pkg_log.info('No of Records processed in DFUVIEW (ALL default) ARE -' || v_processed_count); CLOSE cur_dfuview_all; UPDATE igpmgr.intups_dfuview d SET d.udc_createdate = TRUNC (SYSDATE) WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM scpomgr.dfuview dv WHERE d.dmdunit = dv.dmdunit AND d.dmdgroup = dv.dmdgroup AND d.loc = dv.loc); pkg_log.info ( 'Updated UDC Create date for new DFUVIEWs for ALL - ' || sql%ROWCOUNT ); c_jobid := 'jbn006_ups_dfuview'; --calling igp procedure to move data into live scpo table-- batchmgr.pkg_process_igp.igp_load (jobid_in => c_jobid, status_out => v_proc_status); pkg_log.info ('Records processed from INTUPS_DFUVIEW to DFUVIEW - ALL'); COMMIT; -------------------maruthees /*OPEN cur_dfuview_mro; LOOP BEGIN FETCH cur_dfuview_mro BULK COLLECT INTO v_dmdunit, v_dmdgroup, v_loc, v_dfulevel LIMIT 80000; BEGIN --upsert dfuview records --default dfu creation FORALL j IN INDICES OF v_dmdunit SAVE EXCEPTIONS INSERT INTO igpmgr.intups_dfuview (dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, udc_dfulevel, integration_jobid, integration_stamp) VALUES (v_dmdunit (j), v_dmdgroup (j), v_loc (j), v_dfulevel (j), c_jobid, SYSDATE); COMMIT; EXCEPTION WHEN bulk_errors THEN FOR indx IN 1 .. sql%BULK_EXCEPTIONS.COUNT LOOP --following line will log the error with record key value pkg_log.info(sql%BULK_EXCEPTIONS(indx).ERROR_CODE || v_dmdunit ( sql%BULK_EXCEPTIONS(indx).ERROR_INDEX ) || '-' || v_loc ( sql%BULK_EXCEPTIONS(indx).ERROR_INDEX ) || '-' || v_dmdgroup ( sql%BULK_EXCEPTIONS(indx).ERROR_INDEX )); END LOOP; END; EXIT WHEN cur_dfuview_mro%NOTFOUND; EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN ROLLBACK; pkg_job.fatal_error; RAISE; END; END LOOP; v_processed_count := cur_dfuview_mro%ROWCOUNT; pkg_log.info('No of Records processed in DFUVIEW (MRO default) ARE -' || v_processed_count); CLOSE cur_dfuview_mro; UPDATE igpmgr.intups_dfuview d SET d.udc_createdate = TRUNC (SYSDATE) WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM scpomgr.dfuview dv WHERE d.dmdunit = dv.dmdunit AND d.dmdgroup = dv.dmdgroup AND d.loc = dv.loc); pkg_log.info ( 'Updated UDC Create date for new DFUVIEWs for MRO - ' || sql%ROWCOUNT ); c_jobid := 'jbn006_ups_dfuview'; --calling igp procedure to move data into live scpo table-- batchmgr.pkg_process_igp.igp_load (jobid_in => c_jobid, status_out => v_proc_status); pkg_log.info ('Records processed from INTUPS_DFUVIEW to DFUVIEW - MRO'); COMMIT; -- open cursor and fetch rows using bulk collect -- OPEN cur_dfuview_pi; LOOP BEGIN FETCH cur_dfuview_pi BULK COLLECT INTO v_dmdunit, v_dmdgroup, v_loc, v_dfulevel LIMIT 80000; BEGIN --upsert dfuview records --default dfu creation FORALL j IN INDICES OF v_dmdunit SA VE EXCEPTIONS INSERT INTO igpmgr.intups_dfuview (dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, udc_dfulevel, integration_jobid, integration_stamp) VALUES (v_dmdunit (j), v_dmdgroup (j), v_loc (j), v_dfulevel (j), c_jobid, SYSDATE); COMMIT; EXCEPTION WHEN bulk_errors THEN FOR indx IN 1 .. sql%BULK_EXCEPTIONS.COUNT LOOP --following line will log the error with record key value pkg_log.info(sql%BULK_EXCEPTIONS(indx).ERROR_CODE || v_dmdunit ( sql%BULK_EXCEPTIONS(indx).ERROR_INDEX ) || '-' || v_loc ( sql%BULK_EXCEPTIONS(indx).ERROR_INDEX ) || '-' || v_dmdgroup ( sql%BULK_EXCEPTIONS(indx).ERROR_INDEX )); END LOOP; END; EXIT WHEN cur_dfuview_pi%NOTFOUND; EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN ROLLBACK; pkg_job.fatal_error; RAISE; END; END LOOP; v_processed_count := cur_dfuview_pi%ROWCOUNT; pkg_log.info('No of Records processed in DFUVIEW (PI default) ARE -' || v_processed_count); CLOSE cur_dfuview_pi; UPDATE igpmgr.intups_dfuview d SET d.udc_createdate = TRUNC (SYSDATE) WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM scpomgr.dfuview dv WHERE d.dmdunit = dv.dmdunit AND d.dmdgroup = dv.dmdgroup AND d.loc = dv.loc); pkg_log.info ( 'Updated UDC create date for new DFUVIEWs PI - ' || sql%ROWCOUNT ); --calling igp procedure to move data into live scpo table-- batchmgr.pkg_process_igp.igp_load (jobid_in => c_jobid, status_out => v_proc_status); pkg_log.info ('Records processed from INTUPS_DFUVIEW to DFUVIEW - PI'); COMMIT;*/ -------------------maruthees --1-1-2 level dfuviews INSERT INTO igpmgr.intups_dfuview (dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, udc_dfulevel, integration_jobid, integration_stamp) SELECT dv.dmdunit, dv.dmdgroup, z.zone, '1-1-2', c_jobid, SYSDATE FROM scpomgr.dfuview dv, scpomgr.udt_zonemapping z, scpomgr.dmdunit d WHERE udc_dfulevel = '1-1-1' AND dv.loc = z.service_area AND d.dmdunit = dv.dmdunit AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM SCPOMGR.LOC lc WHERE lc.loc = dv.loc AND (lc.udc_branch_type <> 'VMI' AND lc.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE<> 'RP' AND lc.udc_branch_type <> 'CD' AND lc.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE<> 'IRC')) --UAT--FIX AND dv.loc NOT IN ('NJ06', 'MN43') -- 05417473 --AND d.udc_primary_vendor !='2000500754' /*AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM scpomgr.sku sk WHERE sk.item = d.dmdunit AND sk.loc = dv.loc AND sk.udc_primary_vendor !='2000500754') */ AND d.udc_product_cat = CASE WHEN TRIM (z.product_cat) IS NULL THEN d.udc_product_cat ELSE z.product_cat END --and d.udc_product_cat <> z.product_cat AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM scpomgr.dfuview dv1 WHERE dv1.dmdunit = dv.dmdunit AND dv1.loc = z.zone AND dv1.dmdgroup = dv.dmdgroup) LOG ERRORS INTO IGPMGR.ERR$_intups_dfuview('JOBNAME-jbn006_missing_dfuview_* | SCRIPT-jbn006_missing_dfuview.SQL | STEP-1:INSERT INTO intups_dfuview') REJECT LIMIT 500; --Added for LOG ERROR 26-JAN-22 pkg_log.info ( 'Records processed for 1-1-2 level DFUview -' || sql%ROWCOUNT ); UPDATE igpmgr.intups_dfuview d SET d.udc_createdate = TRUNC (SYSDATE) WHERE NOT EXIST S (SELECT 1 FROM scpomgr.dfuview dv WHERE d.dmdunit = dv.dmdunit AND d.dmdgroup = dv.dmdgroup AND d.loc = dv.loc); pkg_log.info('Updated UDC create date for new DFUVIEWs 1-1-2 Level -' || sql%ROWCOUNT); --calling igp procedure to move data into live scpo table-- batchmgr.pkg_process_igp.igp_load (jobid_in => c_jobid, status_out => v_proc_status); pkg_log.info ('Records processed from INTUPS_DFUVIEW to DFUVIEW - 1-1-2'); COMMIT; --1-2-2 level dfuviews /* INSERT INTO igpmgr.intups_dfuview (dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, udc_dfulevel, udc_fcst_level, integration_jobid, integration_stamp) SELECT dv.dmdu nit, 'ALL', dv.loc, '1-2-2', 'ALL' AS udc_fcst_level, c_jobid, SYSDATE FROM scpomgr.dfuview dv WHERE udc_dfulevel = '1-1-2' AND dv.dmdgroup <> 'ALL' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM scpomgr.dfuview dv1 WHERE dv1.dmdunit = dv.dmdunit AND dv1.loc = dv.loc AND dv1.dmdgroup = 'ALL') LOG ERRORS INTO IGPMGR.ERR$_intups_dfuview('JOBNAME-jbn006_missing_dfuview_* | SCRIPT-jbn006_missing_dfuview.SQL | STEP-2:INSERT INTO intups_dfuview') REJECT LIMIT 500; --Added for LOG ERROR 26-JAN-22 pkg_log.info ( 'Records processed for 1-2-2 level DFUview -' || sql%ROWCOUNT ); UPDATE igpmgr.intups_dfuview d SET d.udc_createdate = TRUNC (SYSDATE) WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM scpomgr.dfuview dv WHERE d.dmdunit = dv.dmdunit AND d.dmdgroup = dv.dmdgroup AND d.loc = dv.loc); pkg_log.info('Updated UDC create date for new DFUVIEWs 1-2-2 Level -' || sql%ROWCOUNT); --calling igp procedure to move data into live scpo table-- batchmgr.pkg_process_igp.igp_load (jobid_in => c_jobid, status_out => v_proc_status); pkg_log.info ('Records processed from INTUPS_DFUVIEW to DFUVIEW - 1-2-2'); COMMIT;*/ --1-2-3 level dfuviews -- doubt do we need this? /* INSERT INTO igpmgr.intups_dfuview (dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, udc_dfulevel, udc_fcst_level, integration_jobid, integration_stamp) SELECT DISTINCT dv.dm dunit, 'ALL', 'HDS', --doubt '1-2-3', 'ALL' AS udc_fcst_level, c_jobid, SYSDATE FROM scpomgr.dfuview dv WHERE udc_dfulevel = '1-2-2' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM scpomgr.dfuview dv1 WHERE dv1.dmdunit = dv.dmdunit AND dv1.loc = 'HDS' AND dv1.dmdgroup = dv.dmdgroup) LOG ERRORS INTO IGPMGR.ERR$_intups_dfuview('JOBNAME-jbn006_missing_dfuview_* | SCRIPT-jbn006_missing_dfuview.SQL | STEP-3:INSERT INTO intups_dfuview') REJECT LIMIT 500; --Added for LOG ERROR 26-JAN-22 pkg_log.info ( 'Records processed for 1-2-3 level DFUview -' || sql%ROWCOUNT ); UPDATE igpmgr.intups_dfuview d SET d.udc_createdate = TRUNC (SYSDATE) WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM scpomgr.dfuview dv WHERE d.dmdunit = dv.dmdunit AND d.dmdgroup = dv.dmdgroup AND d.loc = dv.loc); pkg_log.info('Updated UDC create date for new DFUVIEWs 1-2-3 Level -' || sql%ROWCOUNT); --calling igp procedure to move data into live scpo table-- batchmgr.pkg_process_igp.igp_load (jobid_in => c_jobid, status_out => v_proc_status); pkg_log.info ('Records processed from INTUPS_DFUVIEW to DFUVIEW - 1-2-3'); COMMIT;*/ --ROHINI CHANGES START --1-1-3 level dfuviews INSERT INTO igpmgr.intups_dfuview (dmdunit, dmdgroup, loc, udc_dfulevel, udc_fcst_level, integration_jobid, integration_stamp) SELECT DISTINCT dv.dmdunit, 'ALL', 'ALL', '1-1-3', 'ALL' AS udc_fcst_level, c_jobid, SYSDATE FROM scpomgr.dfuview dv WHERE udc_dfulevel = '1-1-2' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM scpomgr.dfuview dv1 WHERE dv1.dmdunit = dv.dmdunit AND dv1.loc = 'ALL' AND dv1.dmdgroup = dv.dmdgroup) LOG ERRORS INTO IGPMGR.ERR$_intups_dfuview('JOBNAME-jbn006_missing_dfuview_* | SCRIPT-jbn006_missing_dfuview.SQL | STEP-3:INSERT INTO intups_dfuview') REJECT LIMIT 500; --Added for LOG ERROR 26-JAN-22 pkg_log.info ( 'Records processed for 1-1-3 level DFUview -' || sql%ROWCOUNT ); UPDATE igpmgr.intups_dfuview d SET d.udc_createdate = TRUNC (SYSDATE) WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM scpomgr.dfuview dv WHERE d.dmdunit = dv.dmdunit AND d.dmdgroup = dv.dmdgroup AND d.loc = dv.loc); pkg_log.info('Updated UDC create date for new DFUVIEWs 1-1-3 Level -' || sql%ROWCOUNT); --calling igp procedure to move data into live scpo table-- batchmgr.pkg_process_igp.igp_load (jobid_in => c_jobid, status_out => v_proc_status); pkg_log.info ('Records processed from INTUPS_DFUVIEW to DFUVIEW - 1-2-3'); COMMIT; --ROHINI CHANGES END c_jobid := 'jbn006_ups_dfu'; --populating dfus INSERT INTO igpmgr.intups_dfu (dmdunit, loc, dmdgroup, model, dmdcal, integration_jobid, integration_stam p) SELECT dmdunit, loc, dmdgroup, CASE WHEN udc_dfulevel = '1-1-1' THEN 'AVS_SHIP' WHEN udc_dfulevel = '1-1-2' THEN 'MLR_SHIP' WHEN udc_dfulevel = '1-2-2' THEN 'MLR_SHIP' WHEN udc_dfulevel = '1-2-3' THEN 'MVG_SHIP' WHEN udc_dfulevel = '1-1-3' THEN 'MVG_SHIP' -- when udc_fcst_level = 'hds' and udc_dfulevel = '1-2-2' -- then -- 'mlr_ship' -- when udc_fcst_level = 'hds' and udc_dfulevel = '1-2-3' -- then -- 'lew_ship' -- when udc_fcst_level = 'zone' and udc_dfulevel = '1-2-2' -- then -- 'lew_ship' -- when udc_fcst_level = 'zone' and udc_dfulevel = '1-2-3' -- then -- 'mlr_ship' END AS model, 'HDSWEEK' AS dmdcal , c_jobid, SYSDATE FROM scpomgr.dfuview dv WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM scpomgr.dfu df WHERE df.dmdunit = dv.dmdunit AND df.loc = dv.loc AND df.dmdgroup = dv.dmdgroup) AND dmdunit <> ' ' LOG ERRORS INTO IGPMGR.ERR$_intups_dfu('JOBNAME-jbn006_missing_dfuview_* | SCRIPT-jbn006_missing_dfuview.SQL | STEP-4:INSERT INTO intups_dfu') REJECT LIMIT 500; --Added for LOG ERROR 26-JAN-22 pkg_log.info ('Records processed for all levels DFUs'); --calling igp procedure to move data into live scpo table-- batchmgr.pkg_process_igp.igp_load (jobid_in => c_jobid, status_out => v_proc_status); pkg_log.info ('Records processed from INTUPS_DFU to DFU'); COMMIT; c_jobid := 'jbn006_ins_mlr'; --populating params INSERT INTO igpmgr.intins_linregparam (dmdunit, loc, dmdgroup, model, integration_jobid, integration_stamp) SELECT dv.dmdunit, dv.loc, dv.dmdgroup, df.model, c_jobid, SYSDATE FROM scpomgr.dfuview dv, scpomgr.dfu df WHERE dv.dmdunit <> ' ' AND df.model = 'MLR_SHIP' AND df.dmdunit = dv.dmdunit AND df.dmdgroup = dv.dmdgroup AND df.loc = dv.loc AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM scpomgr.linregparam lg WHERE dv.dmdunit = lg.dmdunit AND dv.dmdgroup = lg.dmdgroup AND dv.loc = lg.loc AND df.model = lg.loc) LOG ERRORS INTO IGPMGR.ERR$_intins_linregparam('JOBNAME-jbn006_missing_dfuview_* | SCRIPT-jbn006_missing_dfuview.SQL | STEP-5:INSERT INTO intins_linregparam') REJECT LIMIT 500; --Added for LOG ERROR 26-JAN-22 pkg_log.info ('Records processed for intins_linregparam'); --calling igp procedure to move data into live scpo table-- batchmgr.pkg_process_igp.igp_load (jobid_in => c_jobid, status_out => v_proc_status); COMMIT; pkg_log.info ('Records processed from INTINS_LINREGPARAM to LINREGPARAM'); c_jobid := 'jbn006_ins_lew'; --populating params INSERT INTO igpmgr.intins_lewskiparam (dmdunit, loc, dmdgroup, model, integration_jobid, integration_stamp) SELECT DISTINCT dv.dmdunit, dv.loc, dv.dmdgroup, df.model, c_jobid, SYSDATE FROM scpomgr.dfuview dv, scpomgr.dfu df WHERE dv.dmdunit <> ' ' AND df.model = 'LEW_SHIP' AND df.dmdunit = dv.dmdunit AND df.dmdgroup = dv.dmdgroup AND df.loc = dv.loc AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM scpomgr.lewandowskiparam lg WHERE df.dmdunit = lg.dmdunit AND df.dmdgroup = lg.dmdgroup AND df.loc = lg.loc AND df.model = lg.model) LOG ERRORS INTO IGPMGR.ERR$_intins_lewskiparam('JOBNAME-jbn006_missing_dfuview_* | SCRIPT-jbn006_missing_dfuview.SQL | STEP-6:INSERT INTO intins_lewskiparam') REJECT LIMIT 500; --Added for LOG ERROR 26-JAN-22 pkg_log.info (' Records processed for intins_lewskiparam'); COMMIT; --calling igp procedure to move data into live scpo table-- batchmgr.pkg_process_igp.igp_load (jobid_in => c_jobid, status_out => v_proc_status); pkg_log.info ( 'Records processed from INTINS_LEWSKIPARAM to LEWANDOWSKIPARAM' ); COMMIT; c_jobid := 'jbn006_ins_avs'; --populating params-- INSERT INTO igpmgr.intins_avsgravesparam (dmdunit, loc, dmdgroup, model, integration_jobid, integration_stamp) SELECT DISTINCT dv.dmdunit, dv.loc, dv.dmdgroup, df.model, c_jobid, SYSDATE FROM scpomgr.dfuview dv, scpomgr.dfu df WHERE dv.dmdunit <> ' ' AND df.model = 'AVS_SHIP' AND df.dmdunit = dv.dmdunit AND df.dmdgroup = dv.dmdgroup AND df.loc = dv.loc AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM scpomgr.avsgravesparam avs WHERE df.dmdunit = avs.dmdunit AND df.dmdgroup = avs.dmdgroup AND df.loc = avs.loc AND df.model = avs.model) LOG ERRORS INTO IGPMGR.ERR$_intins_avsgravesparam('JOBNAME-jbn006_missing_dfuview_* | SCRIPT-jbn006_missing_dfuview.SQL | STEP-7:INSERT INTO intins_avsgravesparam') REJECT LIMIT 500; --Added for LOG ERROR 26-JAN-22 pkg_log.info ('Records processed for intins_avsgravesparam'); COMMIT; --calling igp procedure to move data into live scpo table-- batchmgr.pkg_process_igp.igp_load (jobid_in => c_jobid, status_out => v_proc _status); pkg_log.info ( 'Records processed from INTINS_AVSGRAVESPARAM to AVSGRAVESPARAM' ); COMMIT; c_jobid := 'jbn006_ins_mvg'; --Populating PARAMs INSERT INTO igpmgr.intins_movingavgparam (dmdunit, loc, dmdgroup, model, integration_jobid, integration_stamp) SELECT DISTINCT dv.dmdunit, dv.loc, dv.dmdgroup, df.model, c_jobid, SYSDATE FROM scpomgr.dfuview dv, scpomgr.dfu df WHERE dv.dmdunit <> ' ' AND df.model = 'MVG_SHIP' AND df.dmdunit = dv.dmdunit AND df.dmdgroup = dv.dmdgroup AND df.loc = dv.loc AND NOT EXISTS (SELE CT 1 FROM scpomgr.lewandowskiparam lg WHERE df.dmdunit = lg.dmdunit AND df.dmdgroup = lg.dmdgroup AND df.loc = lg.loc AND df.model = lg.model) LOG ERRORS INTO IGPMGR.ERR$_intins_movingavgparam('JOBNAME-jbn006_missing_dfuview_* | SCRIPT-jbn006_missing_dfuview.SQL | STEP-8:INSERT INTO intins_movingavgparam') REJECT LIMIT 500; --Added for LOG ERROR 26-JAN-22 pkg_log.info ('Records processed for intins_movingavgparam'); COMMIT; /*CALLING IGP PROCEDURE TO MOVE DATA INTO LIVE SCPO TABLE*/ batchmgr.pkg_process_igp.igp_load (jobid_in => c_jobid, status_out => v_proc_status); (365 * 3) AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM SCPOMGR.LOC LC WHERE LC.LOC = SM.PL ANT AND (LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'VMI' OR LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'RP' OR LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'IRC' OR LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'CD')) AND DM.UDC_PRODUCT_CAT = CASE WHEN SM.MAPTYPE = 'FAB' THEN SM.PRODUCT_CAT ELSE DM.UDC_PRODUCT_CAT END GROUP BY SO.MATERIAL, SO.SALESTYPE, SM.PLANT, TRUNC (DELIVERYDATE, 'IW') UNION ALL SELECT /*+ PARALLEL */ SO.MATERIAL AS DMDUNIT, SO.SALESTYPE AS DMDGROUP, SM.PLANT AS LOC, SUM (QTY) QTY, TRUNC (DELIVERYDATE, 'IW') DDATE FROM SCPOMGR.UDT_SALESORDERMAPPING SM, SCPOMGR.UDT_SALESORDER SO, SCPOMGR.DMDUNIT DM, SCPOMGR.DFUVIEW DV, SCPOMGR.LOC L WHERE LENGTH (SO.ZIPCODE) > 5 AND SM.ZIPCODE <> SO.ZIPCODE AND SM.ZIPCODE = SUBSTR (SO.ZIPCODE, 1, 5) AND SM.MAPTYPE = SO.MAPTYPE AND SM.UDC_VERTICAL =SO.UDC_VERTICAL AND SM.UDC_DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL =SO.UDC_DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL AND SO.HEADERMATERIAL = DM.DMDUNIT AND DV.DMDUNIT = SO.HEADERMATERIAL AND DV.DMDGROUP = SO.SALESTYPE AND DV.LOC = SM.PLANT AND DV.LOC = L.LOC AND DV.UDC_DFUVIEW_RELOAD_SW = 1 AND (L.UDC_HISTORY_RELOAD_SW IS NULL OR L.UDC_HISTORY_RELOAD_SW = 0) AND SO.DELIVERYDATE >= TRUNC (SYSDATE, 'IW') - as uniq_xids , max(case when dim12_rank <= 10 then uniq_sessions else 0 end) as uniq_sessions , max(case when dim12_rank <= 10 then uniq_instances else 0 end) as uniq_instances , count(*) as dim12_nummem , dense_rank() over (order by dim1_count desc , dim1_val ) as dim1_rank , max(case when dim12_rank <= 10 then dim12_rank else (10 + 1) end) as dim12_rank , max(inst_id) as inst_id from (select wait_class as dim1_val , event as dim2_val , sample_count as dim12_count , dense_rank() over (partition by wait_class order by sample_count desc , event ) as dim12_rank , sum(sample_count) over (partition by wait_class ) as dim1_count , uniq_sqlids , uniq_xids , uniq_sessions , uniq_instances , inst_id from grouped_ash where gid = 13 and wait_class is not null and event is not null ) group by dim1_val , dim1_count , (case when dim12_rank <= 10 then dim2_val else null end) ) group by (case when dim1_rank <= 13 then dim1_val else null end) , (case when dim1_rank <= 13 then dim2_val else null end) ) dim_data ) t )select xmlconcat((select xml_frag from filter_xml), xmlelement("dim_list", xmlconcat((select dim_frag from component_1_xml), (select dim_frag from component_2_xml), (select dim_frag from component_3_xml), (select dim_frag from component_4_xml))) ) from sys.dual

9h7sb6as36bn6.fullText: SELECT JOB_STATE FROM SRE_JOB WHERE JOB_ID = :B1

9n3x4u6j2sass.fullText: DECLARE /*local variables*/ v_processed_count NUMBER (10); c_jobid VARCHAR2 (50) := 'jbi003_upsert_salesorder'; v_proc_status NUMBER (1) := 0; v_error_count NUMBER (10) := 0; BEGIN /*calling igp procedure to move data into live scpo table*/ batchmgr.pkg_process_igp.igp_load (jobid_in => c_jobid, status_out => v_proc_status); pkg_log.info ( 'Records processed from INTUPS_UDT_SALESORDER to UDT_SALESORDER' ); COMMIT; /* DELETE HISTORY OLDER THAN 3 YEARS */ DELETE /*+ PARALLEL(8) */ FROM SCPOMGR.UDT_SALESORDER WHERE DELIVERYDATE <= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'D') - 1095; pkg_log.info ('Salesorder data deleted older than 1095 days-' || SQL%ROWCOUNT); COMMIT; /* DELETE Home Depot Pro History */ DELETE /*+ PARALLEL(8) */ FROM SCPOMGR.UDT_SALESORDER WHERE ship_cust_name ='The Ho me Depot Pro' ; pkg_log.info ('Salesorder data for HD Pro deleted-' || SQL%ROWCOUNT); COMMIT; EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN ROLLBACK; pkg_job.fatal_error; RAISE; END;

aq0t5ju2h9tjh.fullText: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SRE_JOB, SRE_NODE_POOL_CONFIG WHERE SRE_JOB.SERVICE_NAME = SRE_NODE_POOL_CONFIG.SERVICE_NAME AND SRE_JOB.NODE_CONFIG_NAME = SRE_NODE_POOL_CONFIG.NODE_CONFIG_NAME AND SRE_NODE_POOL_CONFIG.POOL_NAME = :B4 AND ((JOB_TYPE = :B3 AND IS_CONTINUOUS_ENABLED = 1) OR (JOB_TYPE = :B2 ) ) AND JOB_STATE = :B1 AND SRE_JOB.JOB_ID IN (SELECT JOB_ID FROM (SELECT JOB_ID, ROWNUM JOBROWNUM FROM (SELECT JOB_ID FROM SRE_JOB WHERE ((((JOB_TYPE = :B3 AND IS_CONTINUOUS_ENABLED = 1) OR (JOB_TYPE = :B2 ) ) AND JOB_STATE = :B1 ) OR (JOB_ID = :B5 ) ) AND LOCKERS_NODE_ID IS NULL AND SUBMISSION_DATE <= SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) ORDER BY JOB_TYPE DESC, JOB_PRIORITY DESC, SUBMISSION_DATE, JOB_ID ) ) WHERE JOBROWNUM < (SELECT MIN(CANDIDATEROWNUM) + :B6 FROM (SELECT JOB_ID, ROWNUM CANDIDATEROWNUM FROM (SELECT JOB_ID FROM SRE_JOB WHERE ((((JOB_TYPE = : B3 AND IS_CONTINUOUS_ENABLED = 1) OR (JOB_TYPE = :B2 ) ) AND JOB_STATE = :B1 ) OR (JOB_ID = :B5 ) ) AND LOCKERS_NODE_ID IS NULL AND SUBMISSION_DATE <= SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) ORDER BY JOB_TYPE DESC, JOB_PRIORITY DESC, SUBMISSION_DATE, JOB_ID ) ) WHERE JOB_ID = :B5 ) )

atp08h4pd9zc6.fullText: SELECT /*+ PARALLEL */ DMDUNIT, DMDGROUP, LOC, SUM (QTY), DDATE FROM ( SELECT /*+ PARALLEL */ SO.MATERIAL AS DMDUNIT, SO.SALESTYPE AS DMDGROUP, SM.PLANT AS LOC, SUM (QTY) QTY, TRUNC (DELIVERYDATE, 'IW') DDATE FROM SCPOMGR.UDT_SALESORDERMAPPING SM, SCPOMGR.UDT_SALESORDER SO, SCPOMGR.DMDUNIT DM WHERE SM.ZIPCODE = SO.ZIPCODE AND SM.MAPTYPE = SO.MAPTYPE AND SM.UDC_VERTICAL =SO.UDC_VERTICAL AND SM.UDC_DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL =SO.UDC_DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL AND SO.HEADERMATERIAL = DM.DMDUNIT AND SO.DELIVERYDATE >= :B1 AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM SCPOMGR.LOC LC WHERE LC.LOC = SM.PLANT AND (LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'VMI' OR LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'RP' OR LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'IRC' OR LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'CD' )) AND DM.UDC_PRODUCT_CAT = CASE WHEN SM.MAPTYPE = 'FAB' THEN SM.PRODUCT_CAT ELSE DM.UDC_PRODUCT_CAT END GROUP BY SO.MATERIAL, SO.SALESTYPE, SM.PLANT, TRUNC (DELIVERYDATE, 'IW') UNION ALL SELECT /*+ PARALLEL */ SO.MATERIAL AS DMDUNIT, SO.SALESTYPE AS DMDGROUP, SM.PLANT AS LOC, SUM (QTY) QTY, TRUNC (DELIVERYDATE, 'IW') DDATE FROM SCPOMGR.UDT_SALESORDERMAPPING SM, SCPOMGR.UDT_SALESORDER SO, SCPOMGR.DMDUNIT DM WHERE LENGTH (SO.ZIPCODE) > 5 AND SM.ZIPCODE <> SO.ZIPCODE AND SM.ZIPCODE = SUBSTR (SO.ZIPCODE, 1, 5) AND SM.MAPTYPE = SO.MAPTYPE AND SM.UDC_VERTICAL =SO.UDC_VERTICAL AND SM.UDC_DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL =SO.UDC_DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL AND SO.HEADERMATERIAL = DM.DMDUNIT AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM SCPOMGR.LOC LC WHERE LC.LOC = SM.PLANT AND (LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'VMI' OR LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'RP' OR LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'IRC' OR LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'CD')) AND SO.DELIVERYDATE >= :B1 AND DM.UDC_PRODUCT_CAT = CASE WHEN SM.MAPTYPE = 'FAB' THEN SM.PRODUCT_CAT ELSE DM.UDC_PRODUCT_CAT END AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SCPOMGR.UDT_SALESORDERMAPPING SM WHERE LENGTH (SM.ZIPCODE) > 5 AND SO.ZIPCODE = SM.ZIPCODE AND SM.MAPT YPE = SO.MAPTYPE AND SM.UDC_VERTICAL =SO.UDC_VERTICAL AND SM.UDC_DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL =SO.UDC_DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL) GROUP BY SO.MATERIAL, SO.SALESTYPE, SM.PLANT, TRUNC (DELIVERYDATE, 'IW')) GROUP BY DMDUNIT, DMDGROUP, LOC, DDATE

bppv04pvu748d.fullText: INSERT /*+ PARALLEL*/ INTO IGPMGR.INTUPS_DFUVIEW (DMDUNIT, DMDGROUP, LOC, UDC_DFULEVEL, INTEGRATION_JOBID, INTEGRATION_STAMP) SELECT /*+ PARALLEL*/ DISTINCT MATERIAL, SALESTYPE, PLANT, UDC_DFULEVEL, :B2 , SYSDATE FROM (SELECT /*+ PARALLEL*/ DISTINCT SO.MATERIAL, SO.SALESTYPE, SM.PLANT, '1-1-1' AS UDC_DFULEVEL FROM SCPOMGR.UDT_SALESORDERMAPPING SM, SCPOMGR.UDT_SALESORDER SO, SCPOMGR.DMDUNIT DM WHERE SM.ZIPCODE = SO.ZIPCODE AND SM.MAPTYPE = SO.MAPTYPE AND SM.UDC_VERTICAL =SO.UDC_VERTICAL AND SM.UDC_DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL =SO.UDC_DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL AND SO.HEADERMATERIAL = DM.DMDUNIT AND SM.PLANT NOT IN ('NJ06', 'MN43') AND DM.UDC_PRODUCT_CAT = CASE WHEN SM.MAPTYPE = 'FAB' THEN SM.PRODUCT_CAT ELSE DM.UDC_PRODUCT_CAT END AND SO.DELIVERYDATE >= :B1 AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM SCPOMGR.LOC LC WHERE LC.LOC = SM.PLANT AND (LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'V MI' OR LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE= 'RP' OR LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'CD' OR LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE= 'IRC')) UNION ALL SELECT /*+ PARALLEL*/ DISTINCT SO.MATERIAL, SO.SALESTYPE, SM.PLANT, '1-1-1' AS UDC_DFULEVEL FROM SCPOMGR.UDT_SALESORDERMAPPING SM, SCPOMGR.UDT_SALESORDER SO, SCPOMGR.DMDUNIT DM WHERE LENGTH (SO.ZIPCODE) > 5 AND SM.ZIPCODE <> SO.ZIPCODE AND SM.ZIPCODE = SUBSTR (SO.ZIPCODE, 1, 5) AND SM.MAPTYPE = SO.MAPTYPE AND SM.UDC_VERTICAL =SO.UDC_VERTICAL AND SM.UDC_DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL =SO.UDC_DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL AND SO.HEADERMATERIAL = DM.DMDUNIT AND SM.PLANT NOT IN ('NJ06', 'MN43') AND DM.UDC_PRODUCT_CAT = CASE WHEN SM.MAPTYPE = 'FAB' THEN SM.PRODUCT_CAT ELSE DM.UDC_PRODUCT_CAT END AND SO.DELIVERYDATE >= :B1 AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM SCPOMGR.LOC LC WHERE LC.LOC = SM.PLANT AND (LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'VMI' OR LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'RP' OR LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE = 'CD' OR LC.UDC_BRANCH_TYPE= 'IRC')) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SCPOMGR.UDT_SALESORDERMAPPING SM WHERE LENGTH (SM.ZIPC ODE) > 5 AND SO.ZIPCODE = SM.ZIPCODE AND SM.MAPTYPE = SO.MAPTYPE AND SM.UDC_VERTICAL =SO.UDC_VERTICAL AND SM.UDC_DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL =SO.UDC_DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL)) LOG ERRORS INTO IGPMGR.ERR$_INTUPS_DFUVIEW('JOBNAME-jbn006_ups_dfuview* | SCRIPT-jbn006_ups_dfuview.sql | STEP-1:INSERT INTO intups_dfuview') REJECT LIMIT 500
